# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Middleware/CheckSessionTimeout.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;

class CheckSessionTimeout
{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        // Щ…ШіЫҢШұЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘШ«ЩҶШ§ (Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШөЩҒШӯЩҮ ЩӮЩҒЩ„ ЩҲ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЫҢШ§ШӘ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЫҢ)
        if ($request->routeIs('lock-screen') || $request->routeIs('lock-screen.unlock') || $request->routeIs('logout')) {
            return $next($request);
        }

        if (auth()->check()) {
            // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШіШҙЩҶ ЩӮЩҒЩ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜШҢ ШұЫҢШҜШ§ЫҢШұЪ©ШӘ Ъ©ЩҶ
            if (session('locked')) {
                return redirect()->route('lock-screen');
            }

            $timeout = (int) \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache::remember('security_session_timeout', 3600, function () {
                return SystemSetting::getValue('security', 'session_timeout', 30);
            }); // ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ

            // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ… ШұЩҲЫҢ 0 ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
            if ($timeout > 0) {
                $lastActivity = session('last_activity_time');
                $now = now()->timestamp;

                if ($lastActivity && ($now - $lastActivity > $timeout * 60)) {
                    session(['locked' => true]);
                    session(['lock_redirect' => $request->url()]);
                    return redirect()->route('lock-screen');
                }

                session(['last_activity_time' => $now]);
            }
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Middleware/HandleInertiaRequests.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Inertia\Middleware;
use Tighten\Ziggy\Ziggy;
use App\Models\Ticket;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;
use App\Models\Slider;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;

use App\Services\ThemeService;

class HandleInertiaRequests extends Middleware
{
    protected $rootView = 'app';
    protected $themeService;

    public function __construct(ThemeService $themeService)
    {
        $this->themeService = $themeService;
    }

    public function version(Request $request): ?string
    {
        return parent::version($request);
    }

    public function share(Request $request): array
    {
        $user = $request->user();

        // 1. Theme Settings via Service
        $activeTheme = $this->themeService->getActiveTheme($user);

        return array_merge(parent::share($request), [
            'auth' => [
                'user' => $user ? [
                    'id' => $user->id,
                    'first_name' => $user->first_name,
                    'last_name' => $user->last_name,
                    'mobile' => $user->mobile,
                    'avatar' => $user->avatar,
                    'roles' => $user->getRoleNames(),
                    'points' => $user->current_points,
                ] : null,
            ],
            // 2. Badges & Notifications (Lazy Evaluation)
            'unreadNotificationsCount' => fn () => $user ? $user->unreadNotifications()->count() : 0,
            'badges' => fn () => $this->getBadges($user),
            'themeSettings' => $activeTheme,
            // 4. Login Settings (Lazy Evaluation)
            'loginSettings' => fn () => \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache::remember('login_settings', 3600, function () {
                return SystemSetting::where('group', 'login')->pluck('value', 'key')->toArray();
            }),
            // 3. ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҮЩҲШҙЩ…ЩҶШҜ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§ЫҢШҜШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШөЩҒШӯЩҮ Ш¬Ш§ШұЫҢ (Lazy Evaluation)
            'pageSlider' => fn () => $this->getPageSlider($request),
            'flash' => [
                'message' => fn () => $request->session()->get('message'),
                'error' => fn () => $request->session()->get('error'),
            ],
            'ziggy' => function () use ($request) {
                return array_merge((new Ziggy)->toArray(), [
                    'location' => $request->url(),
                ]);
            },
        ]);
    }

    private function getBadges($user)
    {
        $ticketBadges = ['user' => 0, 'admin' => 0, 'rewards' => 0];

        if ($user) {
            $ticketBadges['user'] = Ticket::where('user_id', $user->id)
                ->where('status', 'answered')
                ->count();

            if ($user->hasRole(['super-admin', 'admin', 'staff'])) {
                $query = Ticket::whereIn('status', ['open', 'customer_reply']);
                if (!$user->hasRole('super-admin')) {
                    $query->where('assigned_to', $user->id);
                }
                $ticketBadges['admin'] = $query->count();

                // Count pending reward redemptions
                $ticketBadges['rewards'] = \App\Models\RewardRedemption::where('status', 'pending')->count();
            }
        }

        return $ticketBadges;
    }

    private function getPageSlider(Request $request)
    {
        if ($request->isMethod('GET') && !$request->wantsJson()) {
            $currentRoute = Route::currentRouteName();
            if ($currentRoute) {
                return Slider::with('activeSlides')
                    ->where('location_key', $currentRoute)
                    ->where('is_active', true)
                    ->first();
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Middleware/UpdateLastLogin.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class UpdateLastLogin
{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        if (Auth::check()) {
            $user = Auth::user();
            // ШўЩҫШҜЫҢШӘ ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш§ЪҜШұ ЫҢЪ© ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ЪҜШ°ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ъ©ЩҲШҰШұЫҢ
            if (!$user->last_login_at || $user->last_login_at->diffInHours(now()) > 1) {
                $user->update(['last_login_at' => now()]);
            }
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Requests/Admin/Category/UpdateCategoryRequest.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Admin\Category;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;

class UpdateCategoryRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        $categoryId = $this->route('category')->id;

        return [
            'title' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'slug' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255', Rule::unique('categories')->ignore($categoryId)],
            'parent_id' => [
                'nullable', 
                'exists:categories,id', 
                function ($attribute, $value, $fail) use ($categoryId) {
                    if ($value == $categoryId) {
                        $fail('ШҜШіШӘЩҮ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ ШІЫҢШұЩ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШҜШҙ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ.');
                    }
                }
            ],
            'icon' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'is_active' => 'boolean'
        ];
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class LoginRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        $rules = [
            'email' => ['required', 'string', 'email'],
            'password' => ['required', 'string'],
        ];

        if (\App\Models\SystemSetting::getValue('security', 'captcha_enabled', false)) {
            $rules['captcha'] = ['required', 'captcha'];
        }

        return $rules;
    }

    public function messages()
    {
        return [
            'captcha.required' => 'Щ„Ш·ЩҒШ§ Ъ©ШҜ Ш§Щ…ЩҶЫҢШӘЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ.',
            'captcha.captcha' => 'Ъ©ШҜ Ш§Щ…ЩҶЫҢШӘЫҢ Ш§ШҙШӘШЁШ§ЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.',
        ];
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Requests/Auth/RegisterRequest.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;

use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
use Illuminate\Validation\Rules;

class RegisterRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        $rules = [
            'first_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'last_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'email' => ['required', 'string', 'email', 'max:255', 'unique:'.User::class],
            'mobile' => ['required', 'string', 'regex:/^09[0-9]{9}$/', 'unique:'.User::class],
            'password' => ['required', 'confirmed', Rules\Password::defaults()],
            'referral_code' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:50'],
        ];

        if (\App\Models\SystemSetting::getValue('security', 'captcha_enabled', false)) {
            $rules['captcha'] = ['required', 'captcha'];
        }

        return $rules;
    }

    public function messages()
    {
        return [
            'captcha.required' => 'Щ„Ш·ЩҒШ§ Ъ©ШҜ Ш§Щ…ЩҶЫҢШӘЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ.',
            'captcha.captcha' => 'Ъ©ШҜ Ш§Щ…ЩҶЫҢШӘЫҢ Ш§ШҙШӘШЁШ§ЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.',
            'mobile.regex' => 'ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШЁШ§ЫҢЩ„ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ.',
            'mobile.unique' => 'Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШЁШ§ЫҢЩ„ ЩӮШЁЩ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш«ШЁШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.',
        ];
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Requests/Product/RegisterProductRequest.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Product;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class RegisterProductRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'tool_name' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'tool_model' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'tool_brand_name' => 'nullable|string|max:100',
            'tool_serial' => 'nullable|string|max:100', // Ш§Ш®ШӘЫҢШ§ШұЫҢ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШӘЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘЫҢЪ© ШӘЩҲЩ„ЫҢШҜ ШҙЩҲШҜ
            'category_id' => 'required|exists:categories,id',
            
            // Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§
            'tool_pic_file' => 'nullable|file|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:5120', // 5MB
            'invoice_file' => 'required|file|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,pdf|max:5120', // 5MB (Ш§Ш¬ШЁШ§ШұЫҢ)
            
            // Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ЩҶЩӮШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§
            'customer_user' => 'required|in:owner,other',
            'customer_mobile_number' => 'required_if:customer_user,other|nullable|string|min:10|max:15',
            
            'seller_user' => 'required|in:none,owner,other',
            'seller_mobile_number' => 'required_if:seller_user,other|nullable|string|min:10|max:15',
            
            'introducer_user' => 'required|in:none,owner,other',
            'introducer_mobile_number' => 'required_if:introducer_user,other|nullable|string|min:10|max:15',
            
            'guarantee_status' => 'required|in:no_guarantee,reg_guarantee,pre_guarantee',
        ];
    }

    public function attributes()
    {
        return [
            'tool_name' => 'ЩҶШ§Щ… Ш§ШЁШІШ§Шұ',
            'tool_model' => 'Щ…ШҜЩ„ Ш§ШЁШІШ§Шұ',
            'invoice_file' => 'ШӘШөЩҲЫҢШұ ЩҒШ§Ъ©ШӘЩҲШұ',
            'customer_mobile_number' => 'ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШЁШ§ЫҢЩ„ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЫҢ',
        ];
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Http/Requests/ProfileUpdateRequest.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests;

use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;

class ProfileUpdateRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'first_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:50'],
            'last_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:50'],
            'email' => ['nullable', 'string', 'lowercase', 'email', 'max:255', Rule::unique(User::class)->ignore($this->user()->id)],
            'national_code' => ['nullable', 'digits:10', Rule::unique(User::class)->ignore($this->user()->id)],
            'birth_date' => ['nullable', 'date'],
            'gender' => ['nullable', 'in:male,female,other'],
            'job' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:100'],
            'province_id' => ['nullable', 'exists:provinces,id'],
            'city_id' => ['nullable', 'exists:cities,id'],
            'postal_code' => ['nullable', 'digits_between:5,10'],
            'address' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'avatar' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'], // 2MB
            
            // ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ· ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
            'is_agent' => ['boolean'],
            'agent_code' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:20', 'required_if:is_agent,true'],
            'store_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:100'],
        ];
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Imports/ProductSerialsImport.php
<?php

namespace App\Imports;

use App\Models\ProductSerial;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\ToModel;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithHeadingRow;

class ProductSerialsImport implements ToModel, WithHeadingRow
{
    protected $productId;

    public function __construct($productId)
    {
        $this->productId = $productId;
    }

    public function model(array $row)
    {
        // ЩҒШұШ¶ ШЁШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„ Ш§Ъ©ШіЩ„ ШіШӘЩҲЩҶЫҢ ШЁШ§ ЩҶШ§Щ… serial_code ШҜШ§ШұШҜ
        if (!isset($row['serial_code'])) {
            return null;
        }

        return new ProductSerial([
            'product_id'  => $this->productId,
            'serial_code' => $row['serial_code'],
            'is_used'     => false,
        ]);
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Jobs/SendBroadcastNotification.php
<?php

namespace App\Jobs;

use App\Jobs\SendSms;
use App\Models\NotificationBroadcast;
use App\Models\SmsLog;
use App\Models\User;
use App\Notifications\SystemNotification;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Notification;

class SendBroadcastNotification implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    public $timeout = 3600; // 1 hour timeout for large batches
    protected $broadcast;

    public function __construct(NotificationBroadcast $broadcast)
    {
        $this->broadcast = $broadcast;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        $query = User::active();

        if ($this->broadcast->target_type === 'club') {
            $query->where('club_id', $this->broadcast->target_id);
        } elseif ($this->broadcast->target_type === 'manual') {
            $query->whereIn('id', $this->broadcast->recipient_ids ?? []);
        }

        // Process in chunks to manage memory
        $query->chunk(100, function ($users) {
            foreach ($this->broadcast->channels as $channel) {
                if ($channel === 'database') {
                    Notification::send($users, new SystemNotification($this->broadcast->title, $this->broadcast->message));
                } elseif ($channel === 'sms') {
                    foreach ($users as $user) {
                        if ($user->mobile) {
                            $templateId = null;
                            $parameters = [];
                            $message = $this->broadcast->message;

                            if ($this->broadcast->sms_template_id) {
                                $smsTemplate = $this->broadcast->smsTemplate;
                                if ($smsTemplate) {
                                    $provider = \App\Models\SystemSetting::getValue('sms', 'sms_provider');
                                    if (($provider === 'smsir' || $provider === 'sms.ir') && !empty($smsTemplate->provider_template_id)) {
                                        $templateId = $smsTemplate->provider_template_id;
                                        $parameters = [
                                            'name' => $user->first_name ?? 'Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ',
                                            'mobile' => $user->mobile,
                                        ];
                                    } else {
                                        $message = $smsTemplate->content;
                                        $message = str_replace('{name}', $user->first_name ?? 'Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ', $message);
                                        $message = str_replace('{mobile}', $user->mobile, $message);
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            SendSms::dispatch($user->mobile, $message, $user->id, $templateId, $parameters);
                        }
                    }
                } elseif ($channel === 'email') {
                    foreach ($users as $user) {
                        if ($user->email) {
                            try {
                                $subject = $this->broadcast->title;
                                $content = $this->broadcast->message;

                                if ($this->broadcast->email_theme_id) {
                                    $theme = \App\Models\EmailTheme::find($this->broadcast->email_theme_id);
                                    if ($theme) {
                                        $content = str_replace('{content}', $content, $theme->content);
                                        // Add other variable replacements if needed
                                        $content = str_replace('{name}', $user->first_name ?? 'Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ', $content);
                                    }
                                }

                                // Retrieve email settings
                                $settings = \App\Models\SystemSetting::getAllGroupSettings('email');

                                // Configure mailer dynamically
                                config([
                                    'mail.default' => 'smtp',
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.transport' => 'smtp',
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.host' => $settings['mail_host'] ?? $settings['host'] ?? config('mail.mailers.smtp.host'),
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.port' => $settings['mail_port'] ?? $settings['port'] ?? config('mail.mailers.smtp.port'),
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.encryption' => (int)($settings['mail_port'] ?? $settings['port'] ?? 587) === 465 ? 'ssl' : 'tls',
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.username' => $settings['mail_username'] ?? $settings['username'] ?? config('mail.mailers.smtp.username'),
                                    'mail.mailers.smtp.password' => $settings['mail_password'] ?? $settings['password'] ?? config('mail.mailers.smtp.password'),
                                    'mail.from.address' => $settings['from_address'] ?? $settings['mail_from_address'] ?? config('mail.from.address'),
                                    'mail.from.name' => $settings['from_name'] ?? $settings['mail_from_name'] ?? config('mail.from.name'),
                                ]);

                                // Force purge to reload config
                                \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Mail::purge('smtp');

                                $fromAddress = config('mail.from.address');
                                $fromName = config('mail.from.name');

                                \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Mail::html($content, function ($message) use ($user, $subject, $fromAddress, $fromName) {
                                    $message->to($user->email)
                                            ->subject($subject)
                                            ->from($fromAddress, $fromName);
                                });

                                \App\Models\EmailLog::logEmail([
                                    'user_id' => $user->id,
                                    'email' => $user->email,
                                    'subject' => $subject,
                                    'content' => $content,
                                    'status' => 'sent'
                                ]);
                            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                                Log::error("Broadcast Email Failed for user {$user->id}: " . $e->getMessage());
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        });
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Jobs/SendSms.php
<?php

namespace App\Jobs;

use App\Models\SmsLog;
use App\Services\SMS\SmsManager;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class SendSms implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    protected $mobile;
    protected $message;
    protected $userId;
    protected $templateId;
    protected $parameters;

    /**
     * ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ Щ…Ш¬ШҜШҜ ШҜШұ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш®Ш·Ш§
     */
    public $tries = 3;

    public function __construct($mobile, $message, $userId = null, $templateId = null, $parameters = [])
    {
        $this->mobile = $mobile;
        $this->message = $message;
        $this->userId = $userId;
        $this->templateId = $templateId;
        $this->parameters = $parameters;
    }

    public function handle(SmsManager $smsManager): void
    {
        $provider = \App\Models\SystemSetting::getValue('sms', 'sms_provider', 'smsir');
        $provider = strtolower(trim($provider, '/'));

        // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҮ
        $log = SmsLog::logSms([
            'user_id' => $this->userId,
            'mobile' => $this->mobile,
            'message' => $this->message,
            'status' => 'pending',
            'provider' => $provider,
            'sms_type' => $this->templateId ? 'verify' : 'notification'
        ]);

        try {
            $driver = $smsManager->driver($provider);

            // Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШҜШұШ§ЫҢЩҲШұ
            if (!$driver) {
                throw new \Exception("SMS Driver not found: {$provider}");
            }

            // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ШӯШіШ§ШЁ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§ШІ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„
            $credit = $driver->getCredit();
            if ($credit === null) {
                Log::warning('SMS: Could not retrieve credit', ['provider' => $provider]);
            }

            $success = false;

            if ($this->templateId) {
                // Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ
                if (!empty($this->parameters)) {
                    $formattedParams = [];
                    foreach ($this->parameters as $key => $value) {
                        $formattedParams[] = [
                            'name' => $key,
                            'value' => (string)$value
                        ];
                    }
                    $success = $driver->sendVerifyWithParams(
                        $this->mobile,
                        (int)$this->templateId,
                        $formattedParams
                    );
                } else {
                    $success = $driver->sendVerify(
                        $this->mobile,
                        $this->message,
                        $this->templateId
                    );
                }
            } else {
                // Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш№Ш§ШҜЫҢ
                $success = $driver->sendBulk($this->mobile, $this->message);
                Log::info('SMS BULK DEBUG', [
                    'mobile' => $this->mobile,
                    'message' => $this->message,
                    'provider_response' => $success ? 'success' : 'failed'
                ]);
            }

            if ($success) {
                $log->updateStatus('sent', [
                    'cost' => 0,
                    'provider_response' => 'Success'
                ]);

                Log::info('SMS sent successfully', [
                    'mobile' => $this->mobile,
                    'type' => $this->templateId ? 'verify' : 'bulk'
                ]);
            } else {
                throw new \Exception('SMS Provider returned false');
            }
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Ш®Ш·Ш§
            $log->updateStatus('failed', [
                'error_message' => $e->getMessage(),
                'provider' => $provider
            ]);

            Log::error('SMS sending failed', [
                'mobile' => $this->mobile,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
                'provider' => $provider
            ]);

            // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШӘЩ„Ш§ШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§ Ъ©Щ…ШӘШұ Ш§ШІ ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ШҜЩҲШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ Ъ©ЩҶ
            if ($this->attempts() < $this->tries) {
                $this->release(30); // 30 Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШҜЩҲШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ Ъ©ЩҶ
            } else {
                throw $e;
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШӘШ§Ш®ЫҢШұ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ШӘЩ„Ш§ШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш¬ШҜШҜ
     */
    public function backoff(): array
    {
        return [5, 10, 30]; // 5, 10, 30 Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ ШӘШ§Ш®ЫҢШұ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ШӘЩ„Ш§ШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Jobs/SyncWpProducts.php
<?php

namespace App\Jobs;

use App\Services\WordPress\WpProductService;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class SyncWpProducts implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    protected $mapping;
    protected $page;
    public $timeout = 300;

    public function __construct(array $mapping, int $page = 1)
    {
        $this->mapping = $mapping;
        $this->page = $page;
    }

    public function handle(WpProductService $wpService): void
    {
        try {
            $result = $wpService->syncProductsMapped($this->mapping, $this->page, 20);
            
            if ($result['success'] && !$result['finished']) {
                // Dispatch next page
                self::dispatch($this->mapping, $result['next_page']);
            }
            
            Log::info("WP Sync Page {$this->page} Completed.", $result);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error("WP Sync Failed Page {$this->page}: " . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/ActivityLog.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

class ActivityLog extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',          // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ…вҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'admin_id',         // Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ…вҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'action',           // ЩҶЩҲШ№ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§: user.login)
        'action_group',     // ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§: user, point, system)
        'description',      // ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
        'model_type',       // ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ШҜЩ„ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
        'model_id',         // ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…ШҜЩ„ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
        'old_values',       // Щ…ЩӮШ§ШҜЫҢШұ ЩӮШҜЫҢЩ…ЫҢ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢШұШ§ЫҢШҙ)
        'new_values',       // Щ…ЩӮШ§ШҜЫҢШұ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢШұШ§ЫҢШҙ)
        'ip_address',       // ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ…вҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'user_agent',       // Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШұЩҲШұЪҜШұ
        'location',         // Щ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ЫҢШӘ Ш¬ШәШұШ§ЩҒЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ (Ш§Ш®ШӘЫҢШ§ШұЫҢ)
        'device_type',      // ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШҜШіШӘЪҜШ§ЩҮ (web, mobile)
        'severity',         // ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§ЩҮЩ…ЫҢШӘ (info, warning, error)
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'old_values' => 'array',
        'new_values' => 'array',
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ш§ШҜЩ…ЫҢЩҶ (Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘЩҲШіШ· Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ)
     */
    public function admin()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'admin_id');
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЩҫЩ„ЫҢвҖҢЩ…ЩҲШұЩҒЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Щ…ШҜЩ„ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
     */
    public function subject()
    {
        return $this->morphTo('model');
    }

    // ==================== Щ…ШӘШҜЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Щ…ШӘШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШ§ШӘЫҢЪ© ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш«ШЁШӘ ШіШұЫҢШ№ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ
     * 
     * @param string $action ЩҶШ§Щ… Ш№Щ…Щ„ЫҢШ§ШӘ (ШЁШ§ ЩҶЩӮШ·ЩҮ Ш¬ШҜШ§ ШҙЩҲШҜШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§: point.earn)
     * @param string $description ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯШ§ШӘ ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ
     * @param array $context ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ (user_id, model, values, ...)
     * @return ActivityLog
     */
    public static function log($action, $description, $context = [])
    {
        $log = new self();
        $log->action = $action;
        $log->description = $description;
        
        // Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШұЩҲЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ… Ш§Ъ©ШҙЩҶ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§ user Ш§ШІ user.login)
        $parts = explode('.', $action);
        $log->action_group = $parts[0] ?? 'system';

        // ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ… Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        $log->user_id = $context['user_id'] ?? auth()->id();
        $log->admin_id = $context['admin_id'] ?? null;
        
        // ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ… Щ…ШҜЩ„ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
        $log->model_type = $context['model_type'] ?? null;
        $log->model_id = $context['model_id'] ?? null;
        
        // ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ… Щ…ЩӮШ§ШҜЫҢШұ ШӘШәЫҢЫҢШұ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЩҮ
        $log->old_values = $context['old_values'] ?? null;
        $log->new_values = $context['new_values'] ?? null;
        
        // ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ… ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§ЩҮЩ…ЫҢШӘ
        $log->severity = $context['severity'] ?? 'info';
        
        // Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ШіЫҢШіШӘЩ…ЫҢ
        $log->ip_address = request()->ip();
        $log->user_agent = request()->userAgent();
        
        // ШӘШҙШ®ЫҢШө ШіШ§ШҜЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШҜШіШӘЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        $ua = strtolower($log->user_agent ?? '');
        if (strpos($ua, 'mobile') !== false) {
            $log->device_type = 'mobile';
        } elseif (strpos($ua, 'tablet') !== false) {
            $log->device_type = 'tablet';
        } else {
            $log->device_type = 'web';
        }

        $log->save();

        return $log;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ (Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШҜШұ Ъ©ЩҶШӘШұЩ„ШұЩҮШ§)
     */
    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }
}
----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Agent.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use App\Models\Traits\Agent\HasAgentLogic;

class Agent extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;
    use HasAgentLogic; // Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШӘШұЫҢШӘ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШ¬ЩҶШӘ

    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',
        'agent_code',
        'store_name',
        'area',
        'max_clients',
        'commission_rate',
        'is_active',
        'verified_at',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'max_clients' => 'integer',
        'commission_rate' => 'decimal:2',
        'is_active' => 'boolean',
        'verified_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function clients()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(User::class, 'agent_id');
    }

    public function activities()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ActivityLog::class, 'admin_id')
            ->where('action_group', 'referral');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================
    // Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЪҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩӢ ШЁШ§ Ъ©ЩҲШҰШұЫҢ ШЁЫҢЩ„ШҜШұ Ъ©Ш§Шұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ ШҜШұ Щ…ШҜЩ„ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҶШҜ

    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true);
    }

    public function scopeVerified($query)
    {
        return $query->whereNotNull('verified_at');
    }

    public function scopeUnverified($query)
    {
        return $query->whereNull('verified_at');
    }

    public function scopeByArea($query, $area)
    {
        return $query->where('area', $area);
    }

    public function scopeWithAvailableSlots($query)
    {
        return $query->where(function($q) {
            $q->whereNull('max_clients')
              ->orWhereRaw('(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE agent_id = agents.id) < max_clients');
        });
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Category.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class Category extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = ['wp_id', 'parent_id', 'title', 'slug', 'icon', 'is_active'];

    public function parent()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Category::class, 'parent_id');
    }

    public function children()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Category::class, 'parent_id');
    }

    public function products()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Product::class);
    }
    
    // Щ…ШӘШҜ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҶШ§Щ… Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ЩҮ Щ…ШұШ§ШӘШЁЫҢ
    public function getFullNameAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->parent) {
            return $this->parent->full_name . ' > ' . $this->title;
        }
        return $this->title;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Club.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class Club extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'name',              // ЩҶШ§Щ… ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ (ШЁШұЩҶШІЫҢШҢ ЩҶЩӮШұЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҢ ...)
        'slug',              // ЩҶШ§Щ…Ъ© ЫҢЪ©ШӘШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ URL
        'is_tier',           // ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЫҢЪ© ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘШҹ (Щ„ЩҲЩ„ ШЁЩҶШҜЫҢ)
        'icon',              // ШўЫҢЪ©ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        'image',             // ШӘШөЩҲЫҢШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        'min_points',        // ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШұШіЫҢШҜЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·ЩҲШӯ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ)
        'max_points',        // ШіЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ (ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ)
        'joining_cost',      // ЩҮШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ Ш®ШұЫҢШҜ/Ш§ШұШӘЩӮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ
        'color',             // ШұЩҶЪҜ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        'benefits',          // Щ…ШІШ§ЫҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ (JSON)
        'is_active',         // ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        'upgrade_required',  // ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ШұШӘЩӮШ§ ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҜШіШӘЫҢ ШҜШ§ШұШҜШҹ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'is_tier' => 'boolean',           // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'min_points' => 'integer',        // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'max_points' => 'integer',        // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'joining_cost' => 'integer',      // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'benefits' => 'array',            // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'is_active' => 'boolean',         // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'upgrade_required' => 'boolean',  // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ)
     */
    public function users()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(User::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ш§Ш№Ш¶Ш§ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢЪҳЩҮ)
     */
    public function members()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(User::class, 'club_user')
                    ->withPivot('joined_at', 'is_active');
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ
     */
    public function clubRegistrations()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClubRegistration::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function surveys()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Survey::class, 'required_club_id');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШіШ·ЩҲШӯ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ (ШЁШұЩҶШІЫҢШҢ ЩҶЩӮШұЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЩҲ...)
     */
    public function scopeTiers($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_tier', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҲЫҢЪҳЩҮ (Ш§ШӘШ§ЩӮвҖҢЩҮШ§)
     */
    public function scopeSpecial($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_tier', false);
    }

    public function scopeOrderByPoints($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('min_points');
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    public function getBenefitsListAttribute()
    {
        return $this->benefits ?? [];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШіШ·Шӯ ШЁШ№ШҜЫҢ (ЩҒЩӮШ· ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Tier ЩҮШ§)
     */
    public function getNextTier()
    {
        if (!$this->is_tier) return null;

        return self::tiers()
            ->active()
            ->where('min_points', '>', $this->min_points)
            ->orderBy('min_points')
            ->first();
    }

    public function getColorClassAttribute()
    {
        return "club-{$this->slug}";
    }

    public function getMembersCountAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->is_tier) {
            return $this->users()->count();
        }
        return $this->members()->count();
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/ClubRegistration.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\PointRule;
use App\Models\ActivityLog;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\PointTransaction;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class ClubRegistration extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',        // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'club_id',        // ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
        'requested_at',   // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
        'approved_at',    // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ
        'status',         // ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
        'approved_by',    // Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'notes',          // ЫҢШ§ШҜШҜШ§ШҙШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'requested_at' => 'datetime',  // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'approved_at' => 'datetime',   // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
     */
    public function club()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Club::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function approver()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'approved_by');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ
     */
    public function scopePending($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'pending');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeApproved($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'approved');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeRejected($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'rejected');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш®ЫҢШұ
     */
    public function scopeRecent($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('requested_at', 'desc');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШӘЩӮШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ
     */
    public function scopeUpgradeRequests($query)
    {
        return $query->whereHas('user', function($q) {
            $q->whereColumn('users.club_id', '<>', 'club_registrations.club_id');
        });
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeInitialRequests($query)
    {
        return $query->whereHas('user', function($q) {
            $q->whereNull('users.club_id');
        });
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPending()
    {
        return $this->status === 'pending';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isApproved()
    {
        return $this->status === 'approved';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isRejected()
    {
        return $this->status === 'rejected';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getRequestedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->requested_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getApprovedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->approved_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->approved_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
     * @return int|null ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұ ШӯШіШЁ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getProcessingTimeAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->approved_at) {
            return $this->requested_at->diffInHours($this->approved_at);
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШӘЩӮШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isUpgradeRequest()
    {
        return $this->user->club_id && $this->user->club_id != $this->club_id;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isInitialRequest()
    {
        return is_null($this->user->club_id);
    }

    /**
     * ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ
     * @param int $adminId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
     * @param string|null $notes ЫҢШ§ШҜШҜШ§ШҙШӘ Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЫҢ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function approve($adminId, $notes = null)
    {
        // ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ ШҜЫҢШӘШ§ШЁЫҢШі
        DB::beginTransaction();

        try {
            // ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
            $this->update([
                'status' => 'approved',
                'approved_at' => now(),
                'approved_by' => $adminId,
                'notes' => $notes ?: $this->notes,
            ]);

            // ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
            $this->user->update(['club_id' => $this->club_id]);

            // Ш«ШЁШӘ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ
            $pointRule = PointRule::where('action_code', 'club_registration')->first();
            if ($pointRule) {
                PointTransaction::create([
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'type' => 'earn',
                    'amount' => $pointRule->points,
                    'point_rule_id' => $pointRule->id,
                    'reference_type' => self::class,
                    'reference_id' => $this->id,
                    'description' => "Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ {$this->club->name}",
                    'balance_after' => $this->user->current_points + $pointRule->points,
                ]);
            }

            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'club.registration_approved',
                "Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->user->mobile} ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ {$this->club->name} ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['status' => 'pending', 'club_id' => $this->user->getOriginal('club_id')],
                    'new_values' => ['status' => 'approved', 'club_id' => $this->club_id],
                ]
            );

            DB::commit();
            return true;

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            return false;
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШұШҜ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ
     * @param int $adminId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ
     * @param string $reason ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„ ШұШҜ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function reject($adminId, $reason)
    {
        $result = $this->update([
            'status' => 'rejected',
            'approved_at' => now(),
            'approved_by' => $adminId,
            'notes' => $reason . "\n\n" . ($this->notes ?? ''),
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'club.registration_rejected',
                "ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->user->mobile} ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ {$this->club->name} ШұШҜ ШҙШҜ. ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„: {$reason}",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['status' => 'pending'],
                    'new_values' => ['status' => 'rejected'],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Щ…Ъ©Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜЪ©Ш§Шұ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function canAutoApprove()
    {
        // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҜШіШӘЫҢ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· ШұШ§ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
        if (!$this->club->upgrade_required && $this->user->current_points >= $this->club->min_points) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ
     * @return array
     */
    public function getDisplayInfoAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'user_name' => $this->user->full_name,
            'user_mobile' => $this->user->mobile,
            'club_name' => $this->club->name,
            'request_date' => $this->getRequestedAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'status_text' => $this->getStatusText(),
            'processing_time' => $this->processing_time,
            'notes' => $this->notes,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getStatusText()
    {
        $statuses = [
            'pending' => 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ',
            'approved' => 'ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            'rejected' => 'ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
        ];

        return $statuses[$this->status] ?? $this->status;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ„Ш§Ші ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getStatusColor()
    {
        $colors = [
            'pending' => 'warning',
            'approved' => 'success',
            'rejected' => 'danger',
        ];

        return $colors[$this->status] ?? 'secondary';
    }
}
----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/EmailLog.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\ActivityLog;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class EmailLog extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',          // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'email',            // ШўШҜШұШі Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ Щ…ЩӮШөШҜ
        'subject',          // Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
        'content',          // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
        'attachments',      // ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢЩҲШіШӘ
        'provider',         // ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
        'message_id',       // ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШҜШұ ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'status',           // ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„
        'error_message',    // ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш®Ш·Ш§
        'provider_response', // ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'sent_at',          // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„
        'delivered_at',     // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„
        'opened_at',        // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ
        'clicked_at',       // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШұЩҲЫҢ Щ„ЫҢЩҶЪ©
        'ip_address',       // ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'email_type',       // ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'attachments' => 'array',          // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'provider_response' => 'array',    // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'sent_at' => 'datetime',           // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'delivered_at' => 'datetime',      // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'opened_at' => 'datetime',         // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'clicked_at' => 'datetime',        // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeSent($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'sent');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeDelivered($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'delivered');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeOpened($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'opened');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeClicked($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'clicked');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҲЩҒЩӮ
     */
    public function scopeFailed($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'failed');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№вҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeNotification($query)
    {
        return $query->where('email_type', 'notification');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeNewsletter($query)
    {
        return $query->where('email_type', 'newsletter');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШІЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeSentBetween($query, $startDate, $endDate)
    {
        return $query->whereBetween('sent_at', [$startDate, $endDate]);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isOpened()
    {
        return $this->status === 'opened' || !is_null($this->opened_at);
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШұЩҲЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isClicked()
    {
        return $this->status === 'clicked' || !is_null($this->clicked_at);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getSentAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->sent_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->sent_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getOpenedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->opened_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->opened_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ (ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШӘ ШЁЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ)
     * @return int|null ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұ ШӯШіШЁ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getOpenTimeAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->sent_at && $this->opened_at) {
            return $this->sent_at->diffInSeconds($this->opened_at);
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param array $data Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
     * @return EmailLog
     */
    public static function logEmail($data)
    {
        $email = self::create(array_merge([
            'sent_at' => now(),
            'status' => 'pending',
        ], $data));

        // ActivityLog::log is causing issues if not imported or static method issues,
        // and we don't strictly need it for every email log as EmailLog itself is a log.
        // Removing ActivityLog call to prevent potential recursion or errors.

        return $email;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ "ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҮ"
     * @param string|null $ipAddress ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function markAsOpened($ipAddress = null)
    {
        $result = $this->update([
            'status' => 'opened',
            'opened_at' => now(),
            'ip_address' => $ipAddress,
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'email.opened',
                "Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШўШҜШұШі {$this->email} ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['status' => $this->getOriginal('status')],
                    'new_values' => ['status' => 'opened'],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ "Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШҙШҜЩҮ"
     * @return bool
     */
    public function markAsClicked()
    {
        $result = $this->update([
            'status' => 'clicked',
            'clicked_at' => now(),
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'email.clicked',
                "ШұЩҲЫҢ Щ„ЫҢЩҶЪ© Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШўШҜШұШі {$this->email} Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['status' => $this->getOriginal('status')],
                    'new_values' => ['status' => 'clicked'],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢЩҲШіШӘ
     * @return array Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function getAttachmentsListAttribute()
    {
        return $this->attachments ?? [];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ЩҫЫҢЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasAttachments()
    {
        return !empty($this->attachments);
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ЩҶШұШ® ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ (Open Rate) ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш®Ш§ШөЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
     * @param string $type ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
     * @param string|null $period ШҜЩҲШұЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @return float ЩҶШұШ® ШЁШ§ШІ ШҙШҜЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҜШұШөШҜ
     */
    public static function calculateOpenRate($type = null, $period = null)
    {
        $query = self::query();

        if ($type) {
            $query->where('email_type', $type);
        }

        if ($period === 'month') {
            $query->whereMonth('sent_at', now()->month);
        } elseif ($period === 'year') {
            $query->whereYear('sent_at', now()->year);
        }

        $total = $query->count();
        $opened = $query->whereNotNull('opened_at')->count();

        if ($total == 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        return round(($opened / $total) * 100, 2);
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ЩҶШұШ® Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© (Click Rate) ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш®Ш§ШөЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
     * @param string $type ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„
     * @param string|null $period ШҜЩҲШұЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @return float ЩҶШұШ® Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ШҜШұШөШҜ
     */
    public static function calculateClickRate($type = null, $period = null)
    {
        $query = self::query();

        if ($type) {
            $query->where('email_type', $type);
        }

        if ($period === 'month') {
            $query->whereMonth('sent_at', now()->month);
        } elseif ($period === 'year') {
            $query->whereYear('sent_at', now()->year);
        }

        $total = $query->count();
        $clicked = $query->whereNotNull('clicked_at')->count();

        if ($total == 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        return round(($clicked / $total) * 100, 2);
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/LuckyWheel.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class LuckyWheel extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'title', 'description', 'cost_per_spin', 
        'is_active', 'start_at', 'end_at', 'required_club_id'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean',
        'start_at' => 'datetime',
        'end_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function prizes()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(LuckyWheelPrize::class);
    }

    public function spins()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(LuckyWheelSpin::class);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШҙШ§ЩҶШі
     */
    public function spin(User $user)
    {
        // ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ЫҢШІ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҲ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
        $prizes = $this->prizes()->where('is_active', true)
            ->where(function($q) {
                $q->whereNull('stock')->orWhere('stock', '>', 0);
            })
            ->get();

        if ($prizes->isEmpty()) return null;

        // Ш§Щ„ЪҜЩҲШұЫҢШӘЩ… Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ ЩҲШІЩҶЫҢ
        $totalWeight = $prizes->sum('probability');
        $random = rand(1, $totalWeight);
        $currentWeight = 0;
        $selectedPrize = null;

        foreach ($prizes as $prize) {
            $currentWeight += $prize->probability;
            if ($random <= $currentWeight) {
                $selectedPrize = $prize;
                break;
            }
        }

        return $selectedPrize;
    }
}

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

        'cost_paid', 'is_win'
    ];

    {

    }

    public function prize()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(LuckyWheelPrize::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁШ§ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ (Ш§ЪҜШұ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ ЩҒЫҢШІЫҢЪ©ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ)

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/NotificationBroadcast.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

class NotificationBroadcast extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'admin_id', 'title', 'message', 'target_type', 'target_id', 'recipient_ids', 'channels', 'recipient_count', 'email_theme_id', 'sms_template_id'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'channels' => 'array',
        'recipient_ids' => 'array',
        'recipient_count' => 'integer'
    ];

    public function admin()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'admin_id');
    }

    public function emailTheme()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(EmailTheme::class);
    }

    public function smsTemplate()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(SmsTemplate::class);
    }

    public function targetClub()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Club::class, 'target_id');
    }

    // Щ…ШӘШҜ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ ШҜШіШӘЫҢ
    public function getRecipients()
    {
        if ($this->target_type === 'manual' && !empty($this->recipient_ids)) {
            return User::whereIn('id', $this->recipient_ids)->select('id', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'mobile')->get();
        }
        return collect();
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    public function getTargetLabelAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->target_type === 'all') return 'ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ';
        if ($this->target_type === 'club') return 'ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ: ' . ($this->targetClub->name ?? 'ШӯШ°ЩҒ ШҙШҜЩҮ');
        if ($this->target_type === 'manual') return 'Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ ШҜШіШӘЫҢ (' . $this->recipient_count . ' ЩҶЩҒШұ)';
        return $this->target_type;
    }
}
