# D:/clubinex/app/Models/PointRule.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\User;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class PointRule extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'points_required',  // ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ШӘШ§ ШЁШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ ШұШ§ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
        'stock',            // ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮШҢ ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ШұЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜ
        'action_code',      // Ъ©ШҜ ЫҢЪ©ШӘШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ…Щ„ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮвҖҢЩҶЩҲЫҢШіЫҢ)
        'title',           // Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ)
        'description',     // ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯШ§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
        'points',          // Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ (Щ…Ш«ШЁШӘ: ЩҫШ§ШҜШ§ШҙШҢ Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ: Ш¬ШұЫҢЩ…ЩҮ)
        'type',            // ЩҶЩҲШ№ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ (ЫҢЪ©вҖҢШЁШ§ШұШҢ ШӘЪ©ШұШ§ШұШҙЩҲЩҶШҜЩҮШҢ ШҙШұШ·ЫҢ)
        'conditions',      // ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§ (Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ JSON)
        'max_per_user',    // ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        'is_active',       // ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
        'valid_from',      // Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ Ш§ШІ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'valid_to',        // Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ШӘШ§ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'points' => 'integer',          // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'conditions' => 'array',        // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'max_per_user' => 'integer',    // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'is_active' => 'boolean',       // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'valid_from' => 'datetime',     // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'valid_to' => 'datetime',       // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІЫҢ
     */
    public function transactions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(PointTransaction::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     */
    public function referralCommissions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ReferralCommission::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ (Ш§ШІ ЩҶШёШұ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®)
     */
    public function scopeValid($query)
    {
        $now = now();
        return $query->where('is_active', true)
            ->where(function ($q) use ($now) {
                $q->whereNull('valid_from')->orWhere('valid_from', '<=', $now);
            })
            ->where(function ($q) use ($now) {
                $q->whereNull('valid_to')->orWhere('valid_to', '>=', $now);
            });
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ЫҢЪ©вҖҢШЁШ§Шұ Щ…ШөШұЩҒ
     */
    public function scopeOneTime($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'one_time');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШӘЪ©ШұШ§ШұШҙЩҲЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeRepeatable($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'repeatable');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШҙШұШ·ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeConditional($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'conditional');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ШіШЁ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ (Щ…Ш«ШЁШӘ)
     */
    public function scopeEarning($query)
    {
        return $query->where('points', '>', 0);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ШіШұ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ (Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ)
     */
    public function scopeDeduction($query)
    {
        return $query->where('points', '<', 0);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШЁШ§ Ъ©ШҜ Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param string $actionCode Ъ©ШҜ Ш№Щ…Щ„
     */
    public function scopeByActionCode($query, $actionCode)
    {
        return $query->where('action_code', $actionCode);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ (Ш§ШІ ЩҶШёШұ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҲ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isValid()
    {
        $now = now();
        return $this->is_active &&
            (!$this->valid_from || $this->valid_from <= $now) &&
            (!$this->valid_to || $this->valid_to >= $now);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
     * @return array Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ·
     */
    public function getConditionsListAttribute()
    {
        return $this->conditions ?? [];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЫҢЪ©вҖҢШЁШ§Шұ Щ…ШөШұЩҒ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isOneTime()
    {
        return $this->type === 'one_time';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШӘЪ©ШұШ§ШұШҙЩҲЩҶШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isRepeatable()
    {
        return $this->type === 'repeatable';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШҙШұШ·ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isConditional()
    {
        return $this->type === 'conditional';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ъ©ШіШЁ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isEarning()
    {
        return $this->points > 0;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ъ©ШіШұ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDeduction()
    {
        return $this->points < 0;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param array $contextData ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ· ШЁШ§ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶЩҮ Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§
     * @return array [result => bool, reason => string]
     */
    public function canUserApply($userId, $contextData = [])
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
        if (!$this->isValid()) {
            return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ'];
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        if ($this->max_per_user) {
            $usageCount = $this->transactions()
                ->where('user_id', $userId)
                ->count();

            if ($usageCount >= $this->max_per_user) {
                return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШұШіЫҢШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ'];
            }
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· ШҙШұШ·ЫҢ
        if ($this->isConditional() && !empty($this->conditions)) {
            $conditions = $this->getConditionsListAttribute();

            // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШҙШұШ· ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„/ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ
            if (isset($conditions['min_score']) && isset($conditions['max_score'])) {
                $score = $contextData['score'] ?? 0;
                if ($score < $conditions['min_score'] || $score > $conditions['max_score']) {
                    return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ШҙШұШ· ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ШЁШұЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ'];
                }
            }

            // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШҙШұШ· ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ
            if (isset($conditions['min_duration'])) {
                $duration = $contextData['duration'] ?? 0;
                if ($duration < $conditions['min_duration']) {
                    return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ШҙШұШ· Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ'];
                }
            }

            // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШҙШұШ· ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШұЩҲЫҢШҜШ§ШҜ
            if (isset($conditions['event'])) {
                $event = $contextData['event'] ?? '';
                if ($event !== $conditions['event']) {
                    return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ШҙШұШ· ШұЩҲЫҢШҜШ§ШҜ ШЁШұЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ'];
                }
            }
        }

        return ['result' => true, 'reason' => ''];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return int ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getUserUsageCount($userId)
    {
        return $this->transactions()
            ->where('user_id', $userId)
            ->count();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return int|null ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЫҢШӘ ЩҶШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
     */
    public function getRemainingUsageForUser($userId)
    {
        if (is_null($this->max_per_user)) {
            return null;
        }

        $used = $this->getUserUsageCount($userId);
        return max(0, $this->max_per_user - $used);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getValidFromJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->valid_from ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->valid_from)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getValidToJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->valid_to ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->valid_to)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӘШ§ Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§
     * @return string|null Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getRemainingValidityAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->valid_to || $this->valid_to <= now()) {
            return null;
        }

        $diff = now()->diff($this->valid_to);

        if ($diff->days > 0) {
            return "{$diff->days} ШұЩҲШІ";
        } elseif ($diff->h > 0) {
            return "{$diff->h} ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ";
        } else {
            return "{$diff->i} ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ";
        }
    }

    /**
     * Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param array $contextData ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
     * @param string|null $description ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯ Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЫҢ
     * @return PointTransaction|null ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function applyToUser($userId, $contextData = [], $description = null)
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Щ…Ъ©Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
        $canApply = $this->canUserApply($userId, $contextData);
        if (!$canApply['result']) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'point.rule_failed',
                "ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ {$this->title} ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ. ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„: {$canApply['reason']}",
                [
                    'user_id' => $userId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'severity' => 'warning',
                ]
            );
            return null;
        }

        // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІЫҢ
        $transaction = PointTransaction::create([
            'user_id' => $userId,
            'type' => $this->isEarning() ? 'earn' : 'spend',
            'amount' => $this->points,
            'point_rule_id' => $this->id,
            'reference_type' => $contextData['reference_type'] ?? null,
            'reference_id' => $contextData['reference_id'] ?? null,
            'description' => $description ?? $this->title,
            'balance_after' => User::find($userId)->current_points + $this->points,
            'expires_at' => $this->calculateExpirationDate(),
        ]);

        if ($transaction) {
            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'point.rule_applied',
                "ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ {$this->title} ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ. Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ: {$this->points}",
                [
                    'user_id' => $userId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'reference_type' => PointTransaction::class,
                    'reference_id' => $transaction->id,
                ]
            );
        }

        return $transaction;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ
     * @return \Carbon\Carbon|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function calculateExpirationDate()
    {
        if (!$this->isEarning()) {
            return null; // ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШ§ШӘ Ъ©ШіШЁ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ
        }

        $expiryDays = SystemSetting::getValue('points', 'point_expiry_days', 365);

        if ($expiryDays > 0) {
            return now()->addDays($expiryDays);
        }

        return null;
    }


    /**
     ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function activate()
    {
        $result = $this->update(['is_active' => true]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'point.rule_activated',
                "ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ {$this->title} ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['is_active' => false],
                    'new_values' => ['is_active' => true],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function deactivate()
    {
        $result = $this->update(['is_active' => false]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'point.rule_deactivated',
                "ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ {$this->title} ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['is_active' => true],
                    'new_values' => ['is_active' => false],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
     * @return array ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ
     */
    public function getStatisticsAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'total_transactions' => $this->transactions()->count(),
            'total_users' => $this->transactions()->distinct('user_id')->count('user_id'),
            'total_points' => $this->transactions()->sum('amount'),
            'average_per_user' => $this->transactions()->avg('amount'),
            'last_used_at' => $this->transactions()->latest()->first()?->created_at,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ШӯШ°ЩҒ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDeletable()
    {
        return $this->transactions()->count() === 0;
    }
}
----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/PointTransaction.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\User;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class PointTransaction extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',
        'type',
        'amount',
        'point_rule_id',
        'reference_type',
        'reference_id',
        'description',
        'balance_after',
        'expires_at',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'amount' => 'integer',
        'balance_after' => 'integer',
        'expires_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    // --- Relationships ---

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function pointRule()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(PointRule::class);
    }

    public function reference()
    {
        return $this->morphTo();
    }

    // --- Scopes (Restored) ---

    public function scopeEarned($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'earn');
    }

    public function scopeSpent($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'spend');
    }

    public function scopeExpired($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'expire');
    }

    public function scopeAdjustment($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'adjust');
    }

    public function scopeRecent($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
    }

    // --- Helpers ---

    public function isEarned() { return $this->type === 'earn'; }
    public function isSpent() { return $this->type === 'spend'; }
    public function isAdjustment() { return $this->type === 'adjust'; }

    public function getAmountWithSignAttribute()
    {
        return $this->isEarned() || ($this->isAdjustment() && $this->amount > 0)
            ? "+{$this->amount}"
            : "-" . abs($this->amount);
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    public function getTypeFarsi()
    {
        $types = [
            'earn' => 'Ъ©ШіШЁ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ',
            'spend' => 'Ш®ШұШ¬ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ',
            'expire' => 'Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ',
            'adjust' => 'ШӘШ№ШҜЫҢЩ„ ШҜШіШӘЫҢ',
        ];
        return $types[$this->type] ?? $this->type;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ Щ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӯШіШ§ШЁ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш§ШӘЩ…ЫҢ
     * (ШЁШ§ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ ЩӮЩҒЩ„ ШұЪ©ЩҲШұШҜ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ Race Condition)
     */
    public static function createTransaction($data)
    {
        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data) {
            // Lock the user row to prevent race conditions during balance update
            $user = User::where('id', $data['user_id'])->lockForUpdate()->first();

            if (!$user) return null;

            // Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
            $currentBalance = $user->current_points;
            $amount = (int) $data['amount'];

            // Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ ШҙШҜЩҶ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШұШ¬ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩҲ Ъ©ШіШұ)
            if ($amount < 0 && ($currentBalance + $amount < 0)) {
                // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘШ§ЫҢЩҫ "adjust" ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ШҜЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ъ©ШіШұ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҢ ШҙШ§ЫҢШҜ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮ ШҜЩҮЫҢЩ… Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ ШҙЩҲШҜШҹ
                // ЩҒШ№Щ„Ш§ Ш·ШЁЩӮ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮ Щ…Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ„ШҢ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ Щ…Ш¬Ш§ШІ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ШіЫҢШ§ШіШӘ ШіЫҢШіШӘЩ… ШӘШәЫҢЫҢШұ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ.
                throw new \Exception('Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ъ©Ш§ЩҒЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ.');
            }

            $newBalance = $currentBalance + $amount;

            // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШұЪ©ЩҲШұШҜ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ
            $transaction = self::create(array_merge($data, [
                'balance_after' => $newBalance,
            ]));

            // ШўЩҫШҜЫҢШӘ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
            $user->current_points = $newBalance;
            $user->save();

            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            try {
                $action = $transaction->isEarned() ? 'earn' : ($transaction->isSpent() ? 'spend' : 'adjust');
                ActivityLog::log(
                    "point.{$action}",
                    "ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ: {$transaction->description} ({$transaction->getAmountWithSignAttribute()})",
                    [
                        'user_id' => $transaction->user_id,
                        'model_type' => self::class,
                        'model_id' => $transaction->id,
                        'new_values' => ['balance' => $newBalance],
                        'action_group' => 'point'
                    ]
                );
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                // Ш®Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҶШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…Ш§ЩҶШ№ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ ШҙЩҲШҜ
            }

            return $transaction;
        });
    }

    /**
     * Ш§Ш№Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * (ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮ ШіЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ)
     */
    public static function awardPoints($userId, $points, $ruleId = null, $description = '', $reference = null)
    {
        if ($points <= 0) {
            return null;
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШіЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ (Restored Logic)
        $dailyLimit = (int) SystemSetting::getValue('club', 'daily_point_limit', 0);

        // Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ "ШіШұЫҢШ§Щ„ Щ…ШӯШөЩҲЩ„" ЫҢШ§ "Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ…ШӯШөЩҲЩ„" ЫҢШ§ "ЪҜШұШҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШҙШ§ЩҶШі" ШЁШ§ШҙШҜШҢ ШіЩӮЩҒ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШұШ§ ЩҶШ§ШҜЫҢШҜЩҮ ШЁЪҜЫҢШұ
        $isProductRegistration = $reference && (
            $reference instanceof \App\Models\ProductSerial ||
            $reference instanceof \App\Models\ProductRegistration ||
            $reference instanceof \App\Models\LuckyWheelSpin ||
            $reference instanceof \App\Models\RewardRedemption
        );

        if ($dailyLimit > 0 && !$isProductRegistration) {
            $todayEarned = self::where('user_id', $userId)
                ->where('type', 'earn')
                ->whereDate('created_at', today())
                ->sum('amount');

            if (($todayEarned + $points) > $dailyLimit) {
                ActivityLog::log(
                    'point.limit_reached',
                    "ШіЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЫҢ: {$points}ШҢ Ъ©ШіШЁ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҲШІ: {$todayEarned}ШҢ ШіЩӮЩҒ: {$dailyLimit}",
                    ['user_id' => $userId, 'severity' => 'warning']
                );
                return null; // Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Ш№Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ
            }
        } else {
             if ($dailyLimit > 0) {
                 \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log::info("PointTransaction: Bypassing daily limit for user {$userId}. Reference: " . ($reference ? get_class($reference) : 'null'));
             }
        }

        $data = [
            'user_id' => $userId,
            'type' => 'earn',
            'amount' => $points,
            'point_rule_id' => $ruleId,
            'description' => $description,
        ];

        if ($reference) {
            $data['reference_type'] = get_class($reference);
            $data['reference_id'] = $reference->id;
        }

        return self::createTransaction($data);
    }

    /**
     * Ъ©ШіШұ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public static function deductPoints($userId, $points, $ruleId = null, $description = '', $reference = null)
    {
        if ($points <= 0) {
            return null;
        }

        // ЩҶЪ©ШӘЩҮ: ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ createTransaction (ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ© lockForUpdate) Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜ
        // ШӘШ§ Ш§ШІ Race Condition Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ ШҙЩҲШҜ.

        $data = [
            'user_id' => $userId,
            'type' => 'spend',
            'amount' => -$points, // Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҶЩҒЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©ШіШұ
            'point_rule_id' => $ruleId,
            'description' => $description,
        ];

        if ($reference) {
            $data['reference_type'] = get_class($reference);
            $data['reference_id'] = $reference->id;
        }

        return self::createTransaction($data);
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Product.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class Product extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'wp_id',
        'category_id', 'title', 'model_name', 
        'brand',
        'description', 'image', 'points_value', 'is_active'
    ];

    protected $appends = ['display_image'];

    public function category()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Category::class);
    }

    public function serials()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ProductSerial::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўШҜШұШі ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШӘШөЩҲЫҢШұ
     * ШӘШҙШ®ЫҢШө Ш®ЩҲШҜЪ©Ш§Шұ Щ„ЫҢЩҶЪ©вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ЫҢ (ЩҲШұШҜЩҫШұШі) ЩҲ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ„ЩҲЪ©Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function getDisplayImageAttribute()
    {
        $image = $this->image;

        if (!$image) {
            return null;
        }

        // Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ„ЫҢЩҶЪ© Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘ (Щ…Ш«Щ„ Щ„ЫҢЩҶЪ©вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҲШұШҜЩҫШұШі)
        if (filter_var($image, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return $image;
        }

        // Ш§ЪҜШұ ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„ Щ„ЩҲЪ©Ш§Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўШҜШұШі Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ (ЩҒЩӮШ· ЩҶШ§Щ… ЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„ Ш§ШіШӘ)
        if (!str_starts_with($image, '/storage') && !str_starts_with($image, 'http')) {
            return Storage::url($image);
        }

        return $image;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/ProductRegistration.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

class ProductRegistration extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',
        'product_name', 'product_model', 'product_brand', 'serial_code', 'category_id',
        'product_image', 'invoice_image',
        'customer_type', 'customer_mobile',
        'seller_type', 'seller_mobile',
        'introducer_type', 'introducer_mobile',
        'warranty_status',
        'status', 'admin_note', 'admin_id'
    ];

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function category()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Category::class);
    }

    public function admin()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'admin_id');
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    public function getStatusFarsiAttribute()
    {
        return match($this->status) {
            'pending' => 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ',
            'approved' => 'ШӘШ§ЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            'rejected' => 'ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            default => $this->status
        };
    }

    public function getEstimatedPointsAttribute()
    {
        // 1. Try exact match
        $product = Product::where('title', trim($this->product_name))->first();

        // 2. Try loose match (if exact fails)
        if (!$product) {
            $product = Product::where('title', 'like', '%' . trim($this->product_name) . '%')->first();
        }

        if ($product && $product->points_value > 0) {
            return $product->points_value;
        }

        // Return default rule points
        $defaultRule = PointRule::where('action_code', 'product_registration_default')->first();
        return $defaultRule ? $defaultRule->points : 0;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/ReferralCommission.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class ReferralCommission extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'referral_network_id',  // Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
        'level',                // ШіШ·Шӯ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
        'commission_type',      // ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ (ШҜШұШөШҜЫҢ/Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ)
        'commission_value',     // Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
        'earned_points',        // Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ъ©ШіШЁ ШҙШҜЩҮ
        'point_rule_id',        // ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'level' => 'integer',               // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'commission_value' => 'decimal:2',  // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш№ШҙШ§Шұ ШЁШ§ ЫІ ШұЩӮЩ… Ш§Ш№ШҙШ§Шұ
        'earned_points' => 'integer',       // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
     */
    public function referralNetwork()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(ReferralNetwork::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ
     */
    public function pointRule()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(PointRule::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $level ШіШ·Шӯ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ЩҶШёШұ
     */
    public function scopeLevel($query, $level)
    {
        return $query->where('level', $level);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШөШҜЫҢ
     */
    public function scopePercentageType($query)
    {
        return $query->where('commission_type', 'percentage');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ
     */
    public function scopeFixedType($query)
    {
        return $query->where('commission_type', 'fixed');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function scopeByUser($query, $userId)
    {
        return $query->whereHas('referralNetwork', function($q) use ($userId) {
            $q->where('referrer_id', $userId);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШІЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @param string $startDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙШұЩҲШ№
     * @param string $endDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ
     */
    public function scopeBetweenDates($query, $startDate, $endDate)
    {
        return $query->whereBetween('created_at', [$startDate, $endDate]);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұ Ш§ШІ ШӯШҜ Щ…ШҙШ®Шө
     * @param float $minValue ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ
     */
    public function scopeMinValue($query, $minValue)
    {
        return $query->where('earned_points', '>=', $minValue);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШҜШұШөШҜЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPercentage()
    {
        return $this->commission_type === 'percentage';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isFixed()
    {
        return $this->commission_type === 'fixed';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     * @return string Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getCommissionValueFormattedAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->isPercentage()) {
            return "{$this->commission_value}%";
        }
        return number_format($this->commission_value);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ЩҶЩҲШ№
     * @param float $baseAmount Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШ§ЫҢЩҮ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШөШҜЫҢ)
     * @return float Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
     */
    public function calculateCommission($baseAmount = null)
    {
        if ($this->isPercentage() && !is_null($baseAmount)) {
            return round(($baseAmount * $this->commission_value) / 100, 2);
        }
        return $this->commission_value;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ (Ш§ШІ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ referral network)
     * @return User|null Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     */
    public function getReferrerAttribute()
    {
        return $this->referralNetwork->referrer ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ (Ш§ШІ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ referral network)
     * @return User|null Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getReferredAttribute()
    {
        return $this->referralNetwork->referred ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param array $data Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
     * @return ReferralCommission|null Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public static function createCommission($data)
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШӘЪ©ШұШ§ШұЫҢ
        $existingCommission = self::where([
            'referral_network_id' => $data['referral_network_id'],
            'level' => $data['level'],
        ])->first();

        if ($existingCommission) {
            return null;
        }

        $commission = self::create($data);

        if ($commission) {
            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'referral.commission_created',
                "Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ {$commission->level} ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШҙШҜ. Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ: {$commission->earned_points} Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $commission->referrer->id ?? null,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $commission->id,
                    'reference_type' => ReferralNetwork::class,
                    'reference_id' => $commission->referral_network_id,
                ]
            );
        }

        return $commission;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param string|null $period ШҜЩҲШұЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @return float Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public static function getUserTotalCommissions($userId, $period = null)
    {
        $query = self::byUser($userId);

        if ($period === 'today') {
            $query->whereDate('created_at', today());
        } elseif ($period === 'month') {
            $query->whereMonth('created_at', now()->month);
        } elseif ($period === 'year') {
            $query->whereYear('created_at', now()->year);
        }

        return $query->sum('earned_points');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return array ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public static function getUserCommissionStats($userId)
    {
        $stats = [
            'total' => 0,
            'by_level' => [],
            'by_type' => [],
            'recent' => [],
        ];

        // Ъ©Щ„ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
        $stats['total'] = self::getUserTotalCommissions($userId);

        // ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШіШ·Шӯ
        for ($level = 1; $level <= 3; $level++) {
            $stats['by_level'][$level] = self::byUser($userId)
                ->level($level)
                ->sum('earned_points');
        }

        // ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ЩҶЩҲШ№
        $stats['by_type']['percentage'] = self::byUser($userId)
            ->percentageType()
            ->sum('earned_points');

        $stats['by_type']['fixed'] = self::byUser($userId)
            ->fixedType()
            ->sum('earned_points');

        // Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜШӘШұЫҢЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
        $stats['recent'] = self::byUser($userId)
            ->with('referralNetwork.referred')
            ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
            ->limit(5)
            ->get()
            ->map(function($commission) {
                return [
                    'id' => $commission->id,
                    'level' => $commission->level,
                    'type' => $commission->commission_type,
                    'points' => $commission->earned_points,
                    'referred_user' => $commission->referred->full_name ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө',
                    'date' => $commission->getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute(),
                ];
            })
            ->toArray();

        return $stats;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШіШ·Шӯ ЩҲ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШ§ЫҢЩҮ
     * @param int $level ШіШ·Шӯ
     * @param float $baseAmount Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШ§ЫҢЩҮ
     * @return float Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
     */
    public static function calculateCommissionForLevel($level, $baseAmount)
    {
        // ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҶШұШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШІ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
        $commissionRates = SystemSetting::getValue('referral', 'referral_commission_rates', [
            'level_1' => 200,
            'level_2' => 100,
            'level_3' => 50,
        ]);

        $commissionKey = 'level_' . $level;
        return $commissionRates[$commissionKey] ?? 0;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPayable()
    {
        // ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ:
        // 1. Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
        // 2. Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
        // 3. ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШұШ№Ш§ЫҢШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ

        if (!$this->referralNetwork || !$this->referralNetwork->isActive()) {
            return false;
        }

        if (!$this->referrer || !$this->referrer->isActive()) {
            return false;
        }

        $minCommission = SystemSetting::getValue('referral', 'min_commission_payout', 1000);
        if ($this->earned_points < $minCommission) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘ ЪҜШ°Ш§ШұЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     * @param string $paymentMethod ШұЩҲШҙ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ
     * @param string $transactionId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ
     * @param int $adminId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ (Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘЩҲШіШ· Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҙЩҲШҜ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function markAsPaid($paymentMethod, $transactionId, $adminId = null)
    {
        if (!$this->isPayable()) {
            return false;
        }

        // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©ЩҶШҙ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ
        $result = $this->update([
            'paid_at' => now(),
            'payment_method' => $paymentMethod,
            'transaction_id' => $transactionId,
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'referral.commission_paid',
                "Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ {$this->level} ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШЁЩ„Шә {$this->earned_points} Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->referrer->id ?? null,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'reference_type' => ReferralNetwork::class,
                    'reference_id' => $this->referral_network_id,
                    'old_values' => ['paid_at' => null],
                    'new_values' => ['paid_at' => now()],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getPaidAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->paid_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->paid_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPaid()
    {
        return !is_null($this->paid_at);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
     * @return array Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ
     */
    public function getDisplayInfoAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'referrer_name' => $this->referrer->full_name ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө',
            'referrer_mobile' => $this->referrer->mobile ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө',
            'referred_name' => $this->referred->full_name ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө',
            'referred_mobile' => $this->referred->mobile ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө',
            'level_text' => $this->getLevelText(),
            'type_text' => $this->getTypeText(),
            'commission_value' => $this->getCommissionValueFormattedAttribute(),
            'earned_points' => number_format($this->earned_points),
            'created_date' => $this->getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'paid_date' => $this->getPaidAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'is_paid' => $this->isPaid() ? 'ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ' : 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ',
            'is_payable' => $this->isPayable() ? 'ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ' : 'ШәЫҢШұЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұШҜШ§Ш®ШӘ',
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLevelText()
    {
        $levels = [
            1 => 'Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…',
            2 => 'ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШіШ·Шӯ ЫІ',
            3 => 'ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШіШ·Шӯ Ыі',
        ];

        return $levels[$this->level] ?? "ШіШ·Шӯ {$this->level}";
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTypeText()
    {
        $types = [
            'percentage' => 'ШҜШұШөШҜЫҢ',
            'fixed' => 'Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ',
        ];

        return $types[$this->commission_type] ?? $this->commission_type;
    }
}
----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/ReferralNetwork.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\PointRule;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\SystemSetting;
use App\Models\PointTransaction;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class ReferralNetwork extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;
    protected $table = 'referral_network';
    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'referrer_id',      // ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
        'referred_id',      // ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ
        'level',            // ШіШ·Шӯ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ (1: Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…ШҢ 2: ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…ШҢ ...)
        'status',           // ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
        'activated_at',     // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„вҖҢШҙШҜЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'level' => 'integer',           // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'activated_at' => 'datetime',   // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     */
    public function referrer()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'referrer_id');
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function referred()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'referred_id');
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ
     */
    public function commissions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ReferralCommission::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'active');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ
     */
    public function scopePending($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'pending');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeRejected($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'rejected');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $level ШіШ·Шӯ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ЩҶШёШұ
     */
    public function scopeLevel($query, $level)
    {
        return $query->where('level', $level);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… (ШіШ·Шӯ 1)
     */
    public function scopeDirect($query)
    {
        return $query->where('level', 1);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… (ШіШ·Шӯ 2 ШЁЩҮ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§)
     */
    public function scopeIndirect($query)
    {
        return $query->where('level', '>', 1);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш®Ш§Шө (ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ)
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function scopeByReferrer($query, $userId)
    {
        return $query->where('referrer_id', $userId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш®Ш§Шө (ШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ)
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function scopeByReferred($query, $userId)
    {
        return $query->where('referred_id', $userId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШІЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @param string $startDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙШұЩҲШ№
     * @param string $endDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ
     */
    public function scopeBetweenDates($query, $startDate, $endDate)
    {
        return $query->whereBetween('created_at', [$startDate, $endDate]);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isActive()
    {
        return $this->status === 'active';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPending()
    {
        return $this->status === 'pending';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */

    public function isRejected()
    {
        return $this->status === 'rejected';
    }


    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ (ШіШ·Шӯ 1)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDirect()
    {
        return $this->level === 1;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ (ШіШ·Шӯ 2 ШЁЩҮ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isIndirect()
    {
        return $this->level > 1;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„вҖҢШҙШҜЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getActivatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->activated_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->activated_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„вҖҢШҙШҜЩҶ
     * @return int|null Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұ ШӯШіШЁ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getWaitingTimeAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->activated_at) {
            return $this->created_at->diffInHours($this->activated_at);
        }
        return $this->created_at->diffInHours(now());
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ
     * @return int Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШ§ШӘ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ
     */
    public function getTotalCommissionsAttribute()
    {
        return $this->commissions()->sum('earned_points');
    }

    /**
     * ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ (ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ Ш«ШЁШӘвҖҢЩҶШ§Щ… Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function activate()
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
        if (!$this->referred->profile_completed) {
            return false;
        }

        $result = $this->update([
            'status' => 'active',
            'activated_at' => now(),
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
            $this->createCommission();

            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'referral.activated',
                "Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->referred->mobile} ШӘЩҲШіШ· {$this->referrer->mobile} ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->referrer_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'reference_type' => User::class,
                    'reference_id' => $this->referred_id,
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     */
    private function createCommission()
    {
        // ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
        $commissionRates = SystemSetting::getValue('referral', 'referral_commission_rates', [
            'level_1' => 200,
            'level_2' => 100,
            'level_3' => 50,
        ]);

        // ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
        $pointRule = PointRule::where('action_code', 'referral_level_1')->first();
        if (!$pointRule) {
            return;
        }

        // Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШіШ·Шӯ
        $commissionKey = 'level_' . $this->level;
        $earnedPoints = $commissionRates[$commissionKey] ?? 0;

        if ($earnedPoints > 0) {
            ReferralCommission::create([
                'referral_network_id' => $this->id,
                'level' => $this->level,
                'commission_type' => 'fixed',
                'commission_value' => $earnedPoints,
                'earned_points' => $earnedPoints,
                'point_rule_id' => $pointRule->id,
            ]);

            // Ш§Ш№Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
            PointTransaction::awardPoints(
                $this->referrer_id,
                $earnedPoints,
                $pointRule->id,
                "Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ {$this->level} - Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->referred->mobile}",
                $this
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШұШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ (ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ)
     * @param string $reason ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„ ШұШҜ
     * @param int|null $adminId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ (Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘЩҲШіШ· Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҙЩҲШҜ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function reject($reason = '', $adminId = null)
    {
        $result = $this->update([
            'status' => 'rejected',
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'referral.rejected',
                "Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->referred->mobile} ШӘЩҲШіШ· {$this->referrer->mobile} ШұШҜ ШҙШҜ. ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„: {$reason}",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->referrer_id,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'reference_type' => User::class,
                    'reference_id' => $this->referred_id,
                    'severity' => 'warning',
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§Щ…Ъ©Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„вҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШҜЪ©Ш§Шұ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function canAutoActivate()
    {
        // Ш§ЪҜШұ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ ЩҫШұЩҲЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
        return $this->referred->profile_completed;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param int $referrerId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     * @param int $referredId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢШҙШҜЩҮ
     * @return ReferralNetwork|null Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public static function createReferral($referrerId, $referredId)
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ЩӮШЁЩ„ЫҢ
        $existingReferral = self::where('referred_id', $referredId)->first();
        if ($existingReferral) {
            return null;
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҜШҙ ШұШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
        if ($referrerId === $referredId) {
            return null;
        }

        // ЩҫЫҢШҜШ§ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ (Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… = 1)
        $level = 1;

        // Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ Ш®ЩҲШҜШҙ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜШҢ ШіШ·ШӯвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұ ШұШ§ Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…
        $referrer = User::find($referrerId);
        if ($referrer && $referrer->referred_by) {
            // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұ
            self::createIndirectReferrals($referrerId, $referredId);
        }

        // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…
        $referral = self::create([
            'referrer_id' => $referrerId,
            'referred_id' => $referredId,
            'level' => $level,
            'status' => 'pending',
        ]);

        if ($referral) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'referral.created',
                "Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$referral->referrer->mobile}ШҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$referral->referred->mobile} ШұШ§ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $referrerId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $referral->id,
                    'reference_type' => User::class,
                    'reference_id' => $referredId,
                ]
            );
        }

        return $referral;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…
     * @param int $referrerId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…
     * @param int $referredId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param int $currentLevel ШіШ·Шӯ Ш¬Ш§ШұЫҢ (ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш§ШІ 2)
     */
    private static function createIndirectReferrals($referrerId, $referredId, $currentLevel = 2)
    {
        // ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШіШ·ЩҲШӯ Ш§ШІ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
        $maxLevels = SystemSetting::getValue('referral', 'referral_levels', 3);

        if ($currentLevel > $maxLevels) {
            return;
        }

        $referrer = User::find($referrerId);
        if (!$referrer || !$referrer->referred_by) {
            return;
        }

        // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұ
        $indirectReferral = self::create([
            'referrer_id' => $referrer->referred_by,
            'referred_id' => $referredId,
            'level' => $currentLevel,
            'status' => 'pending',
        ]);

        // ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ ШЁШ№ШҜЫҢ
        self::createIndirectReferrals($referrer->referred_by, $referredId, $currentLevel + 1);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ (ШҜШұШ®ШӘ ЩҲШ§ШұЩҲЩҶЩҮ)
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $maxDepth ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ Ш№Щ…ЩӮ
     * @return array ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
     */
    public static function getUserNetwork($userId, $maxDepth = 3)
    {
        $network = [];
        self::buildNetworkTree($userId, 0, $maxDepth, $network);
        return $network;
    }

    /**
     * ШіШ§Ш®ШӘ ШҜШұШ®ШӘ ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘЫҢ
     */
    private static function buildNetworkTree($userId, $currentDepth, $maxDepth, &$network)
    {
        if ($currentDepth >= $maxDepth) {
            return;
        }

        $directReferrals = self::with('referred')
            ->where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->where('level', 1)
            ->active()
            ->get();

        foreach ($directReferrals as $referral) {
            $userData = [
                'user' => $referral->referred,
                'referral_date' => $referral->getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute(),
                'level' => $currentDepth + 1,
                'children' => [],
            ];

            // ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШІЫҢШұШҙШ§Ш®ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
            self::buildNetworkTree(
                $referral->referred_id,
                $currentDepth + 1,
                $maxDepth,
                $userData['children']
            );

            $network[] = $userData;
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return array ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ
     */
    public static function getUserNetworkStats($userId)
    {
        $stats = [
            'direct' => 0,
            'indirect' => 0,
            'total' => 0,
            'total_commission' => 0,
            'active' => 0,
            'pending' => 0,
        ];

        // ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…
        $stats['direct'] = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->where('level', 1)
            ->count();

        // ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…
        $stats['indirect'] = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->where('level', '>', 1)
            ->count();

        $stats['total'] = $stats['direct'] + $stats['indirect'];

        // ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
        $stats['active'] = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->where('status', 'active')
            ->count();

        $stats['pending'] = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->where('status', 'pending')
            ->count();

        // Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§
        $referrals = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)->get();
        foreach ($referrals as $referral) {
            $stats['total_commission'] += $referral->total_commissions;
        }

        return $stats;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return bool
     */
    public static function canUserRefer($userId)
    {
        $user = User::find($userId);

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        if (!$user->isActive()) {
            return false;
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ ЩҫШұЩҲЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„
        if (!$user->profile_completed) {
            return false;
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЫҢШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ (Щ…Ш§ЩҶЩҶШҜ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ ШҜШұ ШұЩҲШІ)
        $todayReferrals = self::where('referrer_id', $userId)
            ->whereDate('created_at', today())
            ->count();

        $maxDailyReferrals = SystemSetting::getValue('referral', 'max_daily_referrals', 10);

        if ($todayReferrals >= $maxDailyReferrals) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ
     * @return array Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ
     */
    public function getDisplayInfoAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'referrer_name' => $this->referrer->full_name,
            'referrer_mobile' => $this->referrer->mobile,
            'referred_name' => $this->referred->full_name,
            'referred_mobile' => $this->referred->mobile,
            'level_text' => $this->getLevelText(),
            'status_text' => $this->getStatusText(),
            'created_date' => $this->getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'activated_date' => $this->getActivatedAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'waiting_time' => $this->waiting_time,
            'total_commission' => $this->total_commissions,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLevelText()
    {
        $levels = [
            1 => 'Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ…',
            2 => 'ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШіШ·Шӯ ЫІ',
            3 => 'ШәЫҢШұЩ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШіШ·Шӯ Ыі',
        ];

        return $levels[$this->level] ?? "ШіШ·Шӯ {$this->level}";
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getStatusText()
    {
        $statuses = [
            'pending' => 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„',
            'active' => 'ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„',
            'rejected' => 'ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
        ];

        return $statuses[$this->status] ?? $this->status;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ„Ш§Ші ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
     * @return string
     */
    public function getStatusColor()
    {
        $colors = [
            'pending' => 'warning',
            'active' => 'success',
            'rejected' => 'danger',
        ];

        return $colors[$this->status] ?? 'secondary';
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Reward.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class Reward extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = [
        'title', 'description', 'image', 'points_cost', 
        'type', 'delivery_instructions', 'stock', 
        'limit_per_user', 'is_active', 'required_club_id', 'valid_until'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean',
        'valid_until' => 'datetime',
        'points_cost' => 'integer',
        'stock' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function club()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Club::class, 'required_club_id');
    }

    public function redemptions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(RewardRedemption::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ©ЩҮ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…Ш¬Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш¬Ш§ЫҢШІЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     */
    public function canUserRedeem(User $user)
    {
        if (!$this->is_active) return false;
        if ($this->stock <= 0) return false;
        if ($user->current_points < $this->points_cost) return false;
        
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШіШ·Шӯ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        if ($this->required_club_id && (!$user->club_id || $user->club->min_points < $this->club->min_points)) {
            return false;
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЫҢШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        if ($this->limit_per_user) {
            $userRedemptions = $this->redemptions()->where('user_id', $user->id)->count();
            if ($userRedemptions >= $this->limit_per_user) return false;
        }

        return true;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/RewardRedemption.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

class RewardRedemption extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',
        'reward_id',
        'lucky_wheel_spin_id', // Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ
        'points_spent',
        'status',
        'admin_note',
        'delivery_info',
        'tracking_code',
        'admin_id'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'delivery_info' => 'array',
    ];

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function reward()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Reward::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁШ§ ЪҶШұШ®Шҙ ЪҜШұШҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ЫҢШІЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ЪҜШұШҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШўЩ…ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜ)
     */
    public function spin()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(LuckyWheelSpin::class, 'lucky_wheel_spin_id');
    }

    // ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ШұШ§ ШӘШәЫҢЫҢШұ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ (Ш§ШҜЩ…ЫҢЩҶ)
    public function admin()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'admin_id');
    }

    public function getStatusFarsiAttribute()
    {
        return match($this->status) {
            'pending' => 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ',
            'processing' => 'ШҜШұ ШӯШ§Щ„ ШўЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ',
            'completed' => 'ШӘЪ©Щ…ЫҢЩ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ/Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            'rejected' => 'ШұШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            'converted' => 'Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜ',
            default => $this->status,
        };
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }
}

class Slide extends Model
{

    protected $fillable = [
        'slider_id', 'image_path', 'bg_text', 'bg_color',
        'title', 'description',
        'button_text', 'button_link',

        // Positioning
        'content_position',
        'btn_relative_pos',
        'btn_pos_type',
        'btn_custom_pos',

        // Styling
        'text_color',
        'text_size',
        'desc_color', // Added
        'desc_size',  // Added
        'gap_y',      // Added
        'button_color',
        'button_bg_color',
        'button_size',

        // Animations
        'anim_speed',
        'text_anim_in',
        'text_anim_out',
        'btn_anim_in',
        'btn_anim_out',

        // Legacy
        'text_position',
        'animation_type',

        'order', 'is_active'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean',
        'gap_y' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function slider()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Slider::class);
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Slider.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class Slider extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'title', 
        'location_key', 
        'height_class', 
        'border_radius',
        'interval', 
        'is_active',
        'effect', 
        'slides_per_view',
        'loop',
        'direction',
        'border_width',
        'border_color',
        'gap',
        'gap_color'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean',
        'loop' => 'boolean',
        'slides_per_view' => 'integer',
        'gap' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function slides()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Slide::class)->orderBy('order');
    }

    public function activeSlides()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Slide::class)->where('is_active', true)->orderBy('order');
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/SmsLog.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class SmsLog extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',          // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'mobile',           // ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШЁШ§ЫҢЩ„ Щ…ЩӮШөШҜ
        'message',          // Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…Ъ©
        'provider',         // ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ SMS
        'message_id',       // ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'status',           // ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„
        'error_message',    // ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш®Ш·Ш§
        'provider_response', // ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШіШұЩҲЫҢШівҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'cost',             // ЩҮШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ (ШұЫҢШ§Щ„)
        'ip_address',       // ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ ШҜШұШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘвҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'sms_type',         // ЩҶЩҲШ№ SMS
        'sent_at',          // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„
        'delivered_at',     // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'provider_response' => 'array',  // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'cost' => 'integer',             // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'sent_at' => 'datetime',         // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'delivered_at' => 'datetime',    // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeSent($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'sent');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeDelivered($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'delivered');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҲЩҒЩӮ
     */
    public function scopeFailed($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', 'failed');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ OTP
     */
    public function scopeOtp($query)
    {
        return $query->where('sms_type', 'otp');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№вҖҢШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeNotification($query)
    {
        return $query->where('sms_type', 'notification');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШІЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     * @param string $startDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙШұЩҲШ№
     * @param string $endDate ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ
     */
    public function scopeSentBetween($query, $startDate, $endDate)
    {
        return $query->whereBetween('sent_at', [$startDate, $endDate]);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ SMS Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isSent()
    {
        return $this->status === 'sent';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ SMS ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDelivered()
    {
        return $this->status === 'delivered';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ SMS ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҲЩҒЩӮ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isFailed()
    {
        return $this->status === 'failed';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getSentAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->sent_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->sent_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getDeliveredAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->delivered_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->delivered_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„ (ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШӘ ШЁЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҲ ШӘШӯЩҲЫҢЩ„)
     * @return int|null ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұ ШӯШіШЁ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getDeliveryTimeAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->sent_at && $this->delivered_at) {
            return $this->sent_at->diffInSeconds($this->delivered_at);
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ SMS Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param array $data Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ SMS
     * @return SmsLog
     */
    public static function logSms($data)
    {
        $sms = self::create(array_merge([
            'sent_at' => now(),
            'status' => 'pending',
        ], $data));

        // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
        ActivityLog::log(
            'sms.sent',
            "SMS ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ {$sms->mobile} Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
            [
                'user_id' => $sms->user_id,
                'model_type' => self::class,
                'model_id' => $sms->id,
            ]
        );

        return $sms;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ SMS
     * @param string $status ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param array $additionalData Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЫҢ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function updateStatus($status, $additionalData = [])
    {
        $updateData = array_merge(['status' => $status], $additionalData);

        if ($status === 'delivered' && !$this->delivered_at) {
            $updateData['delivered_at'] = now();
        }

        $result = $this->update($updateData);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                "sms.{$status}",
                "SMS ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…Ш§ШұЩҮ {$this->mobile} ШЁШ§ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ {$status} ШЁШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['status' => $this->getOriginal('status')],
                    'new_values' => ['status' => $status],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ Ъ©ЩҲШӘШ§ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШҜШұ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ)
     * @param int $length Ш·ЩҲЩ„ Щ…ШӘЩҶ
     * @return string Щ…ШӘЩҶ Ъ©ЩҲШӘШ§ЩҮ
     */
    public function getShortMessageAttribute($length = 50)
    {
        if (strlen($this->message) <= $length) {
            return $this->message;
        }
        return substr($this->message, 0, $length) . '...';
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ЩҮШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ Ъ©Щ„ SMSвҖҢЩҮШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param string|null $period ШҜЩҲШұЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§ЩӢ 'month')
     * @return int ЩҮШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ Ъ©Щ„
     */
    public static function getUserTotalCost($userId, $period = null)
    {
        $query = self::where('user_id', $userId)->whereNotNull('cost');

        if ($period === 'month') {
            $query->whereMonth('sent_at', now()->month);
        } elseif ($period === 'year') {
            $query->whereYear('sent_at', now()->year);
        }

        return $query->sum('cost');
    }
}

        'content',
