# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Survey.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class Survey extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'title',              // Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        'slug',               // ЩҶШ§Щ…Ъ© ЫҢЪ©ШӘШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ URL
        'description',        // ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯШ§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        'type',               // ЩҶЩҲШ№ (Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ/ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ/ЩҒШұЩ…)
        'is_active',          // ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        'is_public',          // Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ)
        'starts_at',          // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        'ends_at',            // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        'max_attempts',       // ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ
        'duration_minutes',   // Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўШІЩ…ЩҲЩҶ (ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ)
        'required_club_id',   // ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ ШіШ·Шӯ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean',      // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'is_public' => 'boolean',      // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'starts_at' => 'datetime',     // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'ends_at' => 'datetime',       // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
        'max_attempts' => 'integer',   // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'duration_minutes' => 'integer', // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function questions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SurveyQuestion::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function answers()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SurveyAnswer::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩҲШұШҜ ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ
     */
    public function requiredClub()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Club::class, 'required_club_id');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopePublic($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_public', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш®ШөЩҲШөЫҢ
     */
    public function scopePrivate($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_public', false);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeQuiz($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'quiz');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШіШ§ШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopePoll($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'poll');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҒШұЩ…вҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function scopeForm($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'form');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҜШіШӘШұШі (ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®)
     */
    public function scopeAvailable($query)
    {
        $now = now();
        return $query->where('is_active', true)
            ->where(function($q) use ($now) {
                $q->whereNull('starts_at')->orWhere('starts_at', '<=', $now);
            })
            ->where(function($q) use ($now) {
                $q->whereNull('ends_at')->orWhere('ends_at', '>=', $now);
            });
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШўЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeUpcoming($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true)
            ->where('starts_at', '>', now());
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЪҜШ°ШҙШӘЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeExpired($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true)
            ->whereNotNull('ends_at')
            ->where('ends_at', '<', now());
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int|null $clubId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function scopeAvailableForUser($query, $userId, $clubId = null)
    {
        return $query->available()
            ->where(function($q) use ($clubId) {
                $q->whereNull('required_club_id')
                  ->orWhere('required_club_id', '<=', $clubId);
            })
            ->whereDoesntHave('answers', function($q) use ($userId) {
                $q->where('user_id', $userId);
            });
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҜШіШӘШұШі Ш§ШіШӘ (ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAvailable()
    {
        $now = now();
        return $this->is_active &&
            (!$this->starts_at || $this->starts_at <= $now) &&
            (!$this->ends_at || $this->ends_at >= $now);
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPublic()
    {
        return $this->is_public;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Ш®ШөЩҲШөЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPrivate()
    {
        return !$this->is_public;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isQuiz()
    {
        return $this->type === 'quiz';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШіШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPoll()
    {
        return $this->type === 'poll';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isForm()
    {
        return $this->type === 'form';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return int ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ
     */
    public function getUserAttemptCount($userId)
    {
        return $this->answers()->where('user_id', $userId)->count();
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param int|null $clubId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return array [result => bool, reason => string]
     */
    public function canUserParticipate($userId, $clubId = null)
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
        if (!$this->isAvailable()) {
            return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҜШіШӘШұШі ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ'];
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ ШіШ·Шӯ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ
        if ($this->required_club_id && (!$clubId || $clubId < $this->required_club_id)) {
            $clubName = $this->requiredClub->name ?? 'ШіШ·Шӯ Ш®Ш§Шө';
            return ['result' => false, 'reason' => "ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲЫҢШӘ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ {$clubName}"];
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЫҢШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ
        if ($this->max_attempts) {
            $attemptCount = $this->getUserAttemptCount($userId);
            if ($attemptCount >= $this->max_attempts) {
                return ['result' => false, 'reason' => 'ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ Щ…Ш¬Ш§ШІ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ'];
            }
        }

        return ['result' => true, 'reason' => ''];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ъ©Щ„ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ
     * @return int ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШҙШұЪ©ШӘвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ
     */
    public function getParticipantsCountAttribute()
    {
        return $this->answers()->distinct('user_id')->count('user_id');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return float|null Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getAverageScoreAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->isQuiz()) {
            return null;
        }

        return $this->answers()->avg('score');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getStartsAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->starts_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->starts_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string|null ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getEndsAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->ends_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->ends_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӘШ§ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @return string|null Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getRemainingTimeAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->ends_at || $this->ends_at <= now()) {
            return null;
        }

        $diff = now()->diff($this->ends_at);

        if ($diff->days > 0) {
            return "{$diff->days} ШұЩҲШІ";
        } elseif ($diff->h > 0) {
            return "{$diff->h} ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ";
        } else {
            return "{$diff->i} ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ";
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @return int ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public function getQuestionsCountAttribute()
    {
        return $this->questions()->count();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШ§ШӘ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Ъ©ШіШЁ
     * @return int Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШ§ШӘ
     */
    public function getTotalPointsAttribute()
    {
        return $this->questions()->sum('points');
    }

    /**
     * ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function activate()
    {
        $result = $this->update(['is_active' => true]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'survey.activated',
                "ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ {$this->title} ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['is_active' => false],
                    'new_values' => ['is_active' => true],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function deactivate()
    {
        $result = $this->update(['is_active' => false]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'survey.deactivated',
                "ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ {$this->title} ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['is_active' => true],
                    'new_values' => ['is_active' => false],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     * @return array ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function getStatisticsAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'participants_count' => $this->participants_count,
            'questions_count' => $this->questions_count,
            'total_points' => $this->total_points,
            'average_score' => $this->average_score,
            'is_available' => $this->isAvailable(),
            'remaining_time' => $this->remaining_time,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ Ш§Ш¬ШЁШ§ШұЫҢ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasRequiredQuestions()
    {
        return $this->questions()->where('is_required', true)->exists();
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/SurveyAnswer.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\PointRule;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use App\Models\PointTransaction;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class SurveyAnswer extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',              // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ
        'survey_id',            // ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ·ЩҮ
        'survey_question_id',   // ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ
        'answer',               // ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ (Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ JSON)
        'score',                // ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ Ъ©ШіШЁ ШҙШҜЩҮ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ)
        'is_correct',           // ШөШӯЫҢШӯ/ШәЩ„Ш· ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ)
        'ip_address',           // ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
        'submitted_at',         // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш«ШЁШӘ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'answer' => 'array',        // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'score' => 'integer',       // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'is_correct' => 'boolean',  // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'submitted_at' => 'datetime', // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function survey()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Survey::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
     */
    public function question()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(SurveyQuestion::class, 'survey_question_id');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
     */
    public function scopeCorrect($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_correct', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШәЩ„Ш·
     */
    public function scopeIncorrect($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_correct', false);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш®ЫҢШұ
     */
    public function scopeRecent($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('submitted_at', 'desc');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $userId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function scopeByUser($query, $userId)
    {
        return $query->where('user_id', $userId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $surveyId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeBySurvey($query, $surveyId)
    {
        return $query->where('survey_id', $surveyId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ Ш®Ш§Шө
     * @param int $questionId ШҙЩҶШ§ШіЩҮ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeByQuestion($query, $questionId)
    {
        return $query->where('survey_question_id', $questionId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§
     * @param int $minScore ШӯШҜШ§ЩӮЩ„ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeHighScore($query, $minScore = 80)
    {
        return $query->where('score', '>=', $minScore);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ)
     * @return string Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
     */
    public function getAnswerTextAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->question->isMultipleChoice()) {
            $options = $this->question->getOptionsListAttribute();
            $answerIndex = $this->answer['selected_option'] ?? null;
            return $options[$answerIndex] ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө';
        }

        return $this->answer['text'] ?? $this->answer['value'] ?? 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШұШҜШ§ШІШҙ)
     * @return mixed Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
     */
    public function getAnswerValueAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->question->isMultipleChoice()) {
            return $this->answer['selected_option'] ?? null;
        } elseif ($this->question->isNumber()) {
            return $this->answer['value'] ?? null;
        } else {
            return $this->answer['text'] ?? null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isCorrect()
    {
        return $this->is_correct === true;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isIncorrect()
    {
        return $this->is_correct === false;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasScore()
    {
        return !is_null($this->score);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш«ШЁШӘ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     * @return string ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getSubmittedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->submitted_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    /**
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШҜШұШөШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
     * @return float|null ШҜШұШөШҜ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getCorrectPercentageAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->survey->isQuiz()) {
            $totalQuestions = $this->survey->questions()->count();
            $correctAnswers = $this->survey->answers()
                ->where('user_id', $this->user_id)
                ->where('is_correct', true)
                ->count();

            if ($totalQuestions > 0) {
                return round(($correctAnswers / $totalQuestions) * 100, 2);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШұШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return string ШЁШ§ШІШ®ЩҲШұШҜ
     */
    public function getFeedbackAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->survey->isQuiz()) {
            return 'ШЁШ§ ШӘШҙЪ©Шұ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЪ©ШӘ ШҙЩ…Ш§';
        }

        if ($this->isCorrect()) {
            return 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҙЩ…Ш§ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ Ш§ШіШӘ! рҹҺү';
        } else {
            $correctAnswer = $this->question->getCorrectAnswerValueAttribute();

            if ($this->question->isMultipleChoice()) {
                $options = $this->question->getOptionsListAttribute();
                $correctOption = $correctAnswer['selected_option'] ?? null;
                return "ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ: " . ($options[$correctOption] ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө');
            } else {
                return "ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ: " . ($correctAnswer['text'] ?? $correctAnswer['value'] ?? 'ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө');
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Ш«ШЁШӘ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @param array $data Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
     * @return SurveyAnswer|null ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ш«ШЁШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public static function submitAnswer($data)
    {
        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ЩӮШЁЩ„ЫҢ
        $existingAnswer = self::where([
            'user_id' => $data['user_id'],
            'survey_id' => $data['survey_id'],
            'survey_question_id' => $data['survey_question_id'],
        ])->first();

        if ($existingAnswer) {
            // ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ
            return $existingAnswer->updateAnswer($data);
        }

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
        $question = SurveyQuestion::find($data['survey_question_id']);
        $survey = Survey::find($data['survey_id']);

        // Fix: Extract value properly based on type
        $val = $data['answer']['value'] 
               ?? $data['answer']['text'] 
               ?? $data['answer']['selected_option'] 
               ?? null;

        $checkResult = $question->checkAnswer($val);

        // Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
        $answer = self::create(array_merge($data, [
            'score' => $checkResult['score'],
            'is_correct' => $checkResult['is_correct'],
            'submitted_at' => now(),
            'ip_address' => request()->ip(),
        ]));

        if ($answer) {
            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'survey.answer_submitted',
                "Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$answer->user->mobile} ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ЫҢ Ш§ШІ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ {$survey->title} ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜШ§ШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $answer->user_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $answer->id,
                ]
            );

            // Ш§Ш№Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ (Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШұШ§ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ)
            if ($survey->isQuiz() && $answer->isCorrect()) {
                $answer->awardPoints();
            }
        }

        return $answer;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ
     * @param array $data Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     * @return $this
     */
    public function updateAnswer($data)
    {
        $oldData = [
            'answer' => $this->answer,
            'score' => $this->score,
            'is_correct' => $this->is_correct,
        ];

        $question = $this->question;
        
        // Fix: Extract value properly
        $val = $data['answer']['value'] 
               ?? $data['answer']['text'] 
               ?? $data['answer']['selected_option'] 
               ?? null;

        $checkResult = $question->checkAnswer($val);

        $this->update(array_merge($data, [
            'score' => $checkResult['score'],
            'is_correct' => $checkResult['is_correct'],
            'submitted_at' => now(),
        ]));

        // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ШӘШәЫҢЫҢШұШ§ШӘ
        ActivityLog::log(
            'survey.answer_updated',
            "ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ {$this->user->mobile} ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШҙШҜ",
            [
                'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                'model_type' => self::class,
                'model_id' => $this->id,
                'old_values' => $oldData,
                'new_values' => [
                    'answer' => $this->answer,
                    'score' => $this->score,
                    'is_correct' => $this->is_correct,
                ],
            ]
        );

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Ш§Ш№Ш·Ш§ЫҢ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
     */
    private function awardPoints()
    {
        $pointRule = PointRule::where('action_code', 'like', 'quiz_score_%')->first();

        if ($pointRule && $this->score >= ($pointRule->conditions['min_score'] ?? 0)) {
            PointTransaction::create([
                'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                'type' => 'earn',
                'amount' => $pointRule->points,
                'point_rule_id' => $pointRule->id,
                'reference_type' => self::class,
                'reference_id' => $this->id,
                'description' => "Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ - {$this->survey->title}",
                'balance_after' => $this->user->current_points + $pointRule->points,
            ]);
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШўШ®ШұЫҢЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isLastAnswerForSurvey()
    {
        $totalQuestions = $this->survey->questions()->count();
        $answeredQuestions = $this->survey->answers()
            ->where('user_id', $this->user_id)
            ->distinct('survey_question_id')
            ->count('survey_question_id');

        return $answeredQuestions >= $totalQuestions;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш®Щ„Ш§ШөЩҮ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
     * @return array Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш®Щ„Ш§ШөЩҮ
     */
    public function getSummaryAttribute()
    {
        return [
            'question_text' => Str::limit($this->question->question, 50),
            'answer_text' => $this->answer_text,
            'score' => $this->score,
            'is_correct' => $this->is_correct ? 'ШөШӯЫҢШӯ' : 'ШәЩ„Ш·',
            'submitted_at' => $this->getSubmittedAtJalaliAttribute(),
            'feedback' => $this->feedback,
        ];
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/SurveyQuestion.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class SurveyQuestion extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'survey_id',        // ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜ
        'question',         // Щ…ШӘЩҶ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
        'type',             // ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ (ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ/Щ…ШӘЩҶЫҢ/Ш№ШҜШҜЫҢ/Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШҜЩҮЫҢ)
        'options',          // ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ)
        'correct_answer',   // ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮЩҮ)
        'points',           // Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
        'is_required',      // Ш§Ш¬ШЁШ§ШұЫҢ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®
        'order',            // ШӘШұШӘЫҢШЁ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'options' => 'array',          // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'correct_answer' => 'array',   // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'points' => 'integer',         // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
        'is_required' => 'boolean',    // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
        'order' => 'integer',          // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ
     */
    public function survey()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Survey::class);
    }

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function answers()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SurveyAnswer::class, 'survey_question_id');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Ш¬ШЁШ§ШұЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeRequired($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_required', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Ш®ШӘЫҢШ§ШұЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeOptional($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_required', false);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШұШӘШЁвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШӘШұШӘЫҢШЁ
     */
    public function scopeOrdered($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('order');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeMultipleChoice($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'multiple_choice');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeText($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'text');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№ШҜШҜЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeNumber($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'number');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШҜЩҮЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeRating($query)
    {
        return $query->where('type', 'rating');
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isMultipleChoice()
    {
        return $this->type === 'multiple_choice';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ Щ…ШӘЩҶЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isText()
    {
        return $this->type === 'text';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ Ш№ШҜШҜЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isNumber()
    {
        return $this->type === 'number';
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШҜЩҮЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isRating()
    {
        return $this->type === 'rating';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ)
     * @return array Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function getOptionsListAttribute()
    {
        return $this->options ?? [];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return array|null ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getCorrectAnswerValueAttribute()
    {
        return $this->correct_answer ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasCorrectAnswer()
    {
        return !empty($this->correct_answer);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
     * @return int ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function getAnswersCountAttribute()
    {
        return $this->answers()->count();
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШөШӯЫҢШӯ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @param mixed $userAnswer ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     * @return array [is_correct => bool, score => int, feedback => string]
     */
    public function checkAnswer($userAnswer)
    {
        if (!$this->hasCorrectAnswer()) {
            return [
                'is_correct' => null,
                'score' => $this->points,
                'feedback' => 'Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ'
            ];
        }

        $correctAnswer = $this->getCorrectAnswerValueAttribute();
        $isCorrect = false;

        // ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
        switch ($this->type) {
            case 'multiple_choice':
                $isCorrect = $userAnswer == $correctAnswer['selected_option'] ?? null;
                break;
            
            case 'number':
                $min = $correctAnswer['min'] ?? null;
                $max = $correctAnswer['max'] ?? null;
                $isCorrect = ($min === null || $userAnswer >= $min) && 
                           ($max === null || $userAnswer <= $max);
                break;
            
            case 'text':
                $correctText = strtolower(trim($correctAnswer['text'] ?? ''));
                $userText = strtolower(trim($userAnswer));
                $isCorrect = $correctText === $userText;
                break;
        }

        return [
            'is_correct' => $isCorrect,
            'score' => $isCorrect ? $this->points : 0,
            'feedback' => $isCorrect ? 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШөШӯЫҢШӯ Ш§ШіШӘ' : 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ЩҶШ§ШҜШұШіШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ'
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ЩҫШ§ШіШ®вҖҢЩҮШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ
     * @return array ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    public function getOptionsStatisticsAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->isMultipleChoice()) {
            return [];
        }

        $options = $this->getOptionsListAttribute();
        $statistics = [];

        foreach ($options as $index => $option) {
            $count = $this->answers()
                ->whereRaw("JSON_EXTRACT(answer, '$.selected_option') = ?", [$index])
                ->count();

            $percentage = $this->answers_count > 0 
                ? round(($count / $this->answers_count) * 100, 2)
                : 0;

            $statistics[] = [
                'option' => $option,
                'index' => $index,
                'count' => $count,
                'percentage' => $percentage,
                'is_correct' => $this->getCorrectAnswerValueAttribute()['selected_option'] ?? null == $index,
            ];
        }

        return $statistics;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ)
     * @return float|null Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ШұЩҮ ЫҢШ§ null
     */
    public function getAverageScoreAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->survey->isQuiz()) {
            return $this->answers()->avg('score');
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШӘШұШӘЫҢШЁ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„
     * @param string $direction Ш¬ЩҮШӘ ('up' ЫҢШ§ 'down')
     * @return bool
     */
    public function move($direction)
    {
        if ($direction === 'up') {
            $previous = $this->survey->questions()
                ->where('order', '<', $this->order)
                ->orderBy('order', 'desc')
                ->first();
            
            if ($previous) {
                $this->order = $previous->order;
                $previous->order = $previous->order + 1;
                $previous->save();
                $this->save();
                return true;
            }
        } elseif ($direction === 'down') {
            $next = $this->survey->questions()
                ->where('order', '>', $this->order)
                ->orderBy('order')
                ->first();
            
            if ($next) {
                $this->order = $next->order;
                $next->order = $next->order - 1;
                $next->save();
                $this->save();
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ШӯШ°ЩҒ Ш§ШіШӘ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDeletable()
    {
        return $this->answers()->count() === 0;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШіЩҲШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ
     * @return string ЩҶЩҲШ№ ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getTypeFarsiAttribute()
    {
        $types = [
            'multiple_choice' => 'ЪҶЩҶШҜЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ',
            'text' => 'Щ…ШӘЩҶЫҢ',
            'number' => 'Ш№ШҜШҜЫҢ',
            'rating' => 'Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШҜЩҮЫҢ',
        ];

        return $types[$this->type] ?? $this->type;
    }
}
----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/SystemSetting.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

class SystemSetting extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'group',        // ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
        'key',          // Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
        'value',        // Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
        'type',         // ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ
        'label',        // ШЁШұЪҶШіШЁ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙЫҢ
        'description',  // ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯШ§ШӘ
        'is_public',    // ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШҜШұ ЩҫЩҶЩ„ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұЫҢ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'is_public' => 'boolean',   // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
    ];

    /**
     * Ш№Щ…Щ„ЫҢШ§ШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШҜЩ„ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШҜЫҢШұЫҢШӘ Ъ©Шҙ
     */
    protected static function booted()
    {
        $clearCache = function () {
            try {
                if (Schema::hasTable('cache')) {
                     cache()->forget('global_settings');
                     cache()->forget('global_settings_array');
                     cache()->forget('login_settings');
                     cache()->forget('security_session_timeout');
                }
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                // ШҜШұ ЩҮЩҶЪҜШ§Щ… Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§ЫҢ ШіЫҢШҜШұЩҮШ§ ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш§ЫҢЪҜШұЫҢШҙЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ Ш§ЪҜШұ Ъ©Шҙ ШҜШұ ШҜШіШӘШұШі ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜШҢ Ш®Ш·Ш§ ЩҶШҜЩҮШҜ
            }
        };

        static::saved($clearCache);
        static::deleted($clearCache);
        static::created($clearCache);
    }

    // ==================== Accessors & Mutators ====================

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШЁШ§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШ№
     * Ш§ШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӯЩ„ Щ…ШҙЪ©Щ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ Ъ©Ш§ШұШ§Ъ©ШӘШұЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЫҢЩҲЩҶЫҢЪ©ШҜ
     */
    public function getValueAttribute($value)
    {
        if (is_null($value)) {
            return null;
        }

        // Ш§ЪҜШұ ЩҶЩҲШ№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ШҜЫҢЪ©ШҜ Ъ©ЩҶ
        if ($this->type === 'array' || $this->type === 'object' || $this->type === 'boolean') {
            return json_decode($value, true);
        }

        // --- ЩҒЫҢЪ©Ші Щ…ШҙЪ©Щ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ЫҢЩҲЩҶЫҢЪ©ШҜ ---
        // Ш§ЪҜШұ ЩҶЩҲШ№ "string" Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ШҜЫҢШӘШ§ШЁЫҢШі ШҙШЁЫҢЩҮ JSON String Ш§ШіШӘ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§ "\u062a...")
        // ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ШҜЫҢЪ©ШҜ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШӘЩҶ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ ШЁШұШіЫҢЩ….
        if ($this->type === 'string') {
            // ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜЫҢЪ©ШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ (Щ…Ш«Щ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ "ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ" ШЁШ§ Ъ©ЩҲШӘЫҢШҙЩҶ Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ)
            $decoded = json_decode($value);

            // Ш§ЪҜШұ ШҜЫҢЪ©ШҜ Щ…ЩҲЩҒЩӮ ШЁЩҲШҜ ЩҲ Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬ЫҢ ЫҢЪ© ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ШіШ§Щ„Щ… ШЁЩҲШҜШҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШұЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶ
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_string($decoded)) {
                return $decoded;
            }
        }

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШЁШ§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШ№
     * Ш§ШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE
     */
    public function setValueAttribute($value)
    {
        if (is_array($value) || is_bool($value) || is_object($value)) {
            // Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҜЫҢШӘШ§ШЁЫҢШі
            $this->attributes['value'] = json_encode($value, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        } else {
            // Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ ШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш®Ш§Щ… (ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§ЩҶЪ©ШҜ Ш§Ш¶Ш§ЩҒЫҢ)
            $this->attributes['value'] = (string) $value;
        }
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ Ш®Ш§Шө
     */
    public function scopeGroup($query, $group)
    {
        return $query->where('group', $group);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ
     */
    public function scopePublic($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_public', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш®ШөЩҲШөЫҢ
     */
    public function scopePrivate($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_public', false);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШЁШ§ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш®Ш§Шө
     */
    public function scopeType($query, $type)
    {
        return $query->where('type', $type);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->whereNull('deleted_at');
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public static function getValue($group, $key, $default = null)
    {
        $setting = self::where('group', $group)
            ->where('key', $key)
            ->active()
            ->first();

        if ($setting) {
            return $setting->value;
        }

        return $default;
    }

    /**
     * Ш°Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public static function setValue($group, $key, $value, $label = null, $description = null)
    {
        $setting = self::where('group', $group)
            ->where('key', $key)
            ->first();

        $type = self::detectType($value);

        if ($setting) {
            $setting->update([
                'value' => $value,
                'type' => $type,
                'label' => $label ?: $setting->label,
                'description' => $description ?: $setting->description,
            ]);
        } else {
            $setting = self::create([
                'group' => $group,
                'key' => $key,
                'value' => $value,
                'type' => $type,
                'label' => $label ?: ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $key)),
                'description' => $description,
                'is_public' => false,
            ]);
        }

        return $setting;
    }

    /**
     * ШӘШҙШ®ЫҢШө ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ
     */
    private static function detectType($value)
    {
        if (is_array($value) || is_object($value)) {
            return 'array';
        } elseif (is_bool($value)) {
            return 'boolean';
        } elseif (is_numeric($value) && !is_string($value)) { // ЪҶЪ© ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮвҖҢШӘШұ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш№ШҜШ§ШҜ
            return 'number';
        } else {
            return 'string';
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЫҢЪ© ЪҜШұЩҲЩҮ
     */
    public static function getAllGroupSettings($group)
    {
        return self::where('group', $group)
            ->active()
            ->get()
            ->pluck('value', 'key')
            ->toArray();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ-Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ
     */
    public static function getSettingsArray($group = null)
    {
        $query = self::query();

        if ($group) {
            $query->where('group', $group);
        }

        return $query->active()
            ->get()
            ->mapWithKeys(function($setting) {
                return [$setting->group . '.' . $setting->key => $setting->value];
            })
            ->toArray();
    }

    /**
     * ШӯШ°ЩҒ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public static function removeSetting($group, $key)
    {
        return self::where('group', $group)
            ->where('key', $key)
            ->delete();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ
     */
    public static function getPublicSettings()
    {
        return self::public()
            ->active()
            ->get()
            ->map(function($setting) {
                return [
                    'key' => $setting->key,
                    'label' => $setting->label,
                    'value' => $setting->value,
                    'type' => $setting->type,
                    'description' => $setting->description,
                ];
            })
            ->groupBy('group')
            ->toArray();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШіЫҢШіШӘЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ЩҮЩ…
     */
    public static function getSystemDefaults()
    {
        return [
            'points' => [
                'point_expiry_days' => 365,
                'min_points_for_spend' => 100,
                'max_daily_earn' => 1000,
            ],
            'referral' => [
                'referral_levels' => 3,
                'referral_commission_rates' => [
                    'level_1' => 200,
                    'level_2' => 100,
                    'level_3' => 50,
                ],
                'max_daily_referrals' => 10,
                'min_commission_payout' => 1000,
            ],
            'club' => [
                'auto_upgrade_enabled' => true,
                'upgrade_approval_required' => true,
            ],
            'survey' => [
                'default_max_attempts' => 1,
                'quiz_time_limit' => 1800, // 30 ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ
            ],
            'sms' => [
                'provider' => 'kavenegar',
                'max_otp_attempts' => 3,
                'otp_expiry_minutes' => 5,
                'resend_interval' => 120,
                'sms_ir_template_id' => '',
                'sms_ir_parameter_name' => 'Code',
            ],
            'email' => [
                'provider' => 'mail',
                'from_address' => 'noreply@clubinex.com',
                'from_name' => 'Clubinex',
            ],
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШ§ШұЪҜШ°Ш§ШұЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҫЫҢШҙвҖҢЩҒШұШ¶
     */
    public static function loadDefaults()
    {
        $defaults = self::getSystemDefaults();

        foreach ($defaults as $group => $settings) {
            foreach ($settings as $key => $value) {
                self::setValue($group, $key, $value);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public function validate()
    {
        $validators = [
            'number' => 'numeric',
            'boolean' => 'boolean',
            'string' => 'string',
            'array' => 'array',
            'object' => 'array',
        ];

        $validator = $validators[$this->type] ?? null;

        if ($validator) {
            return gettype($this->value) === $validator;
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШЁШұЪҶШіШЁ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ
     */
    public function getFullLabelAttribute()
    {
        return "{$this->group}.{$this->key}";
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш§ШіШӘ
     */
    public function isDisplayable()
    {
        return $this->is_public && $this->validate();
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getFormattedValueAttribute()
    {
        switch ($this->type) {
            case 'boolean':
                return $this->value ? 'ШЁЩ„ЩҮ' : 'Ш®ЫҢШұ';
            case 'array':
                return is_array($this->value) ? implode(', ', $this->value) : json_encode($this->value, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            default:
                return $this->value;
        }
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Ticket.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

class Ticket extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = ['user_id', 'assigned_to', 'subject', 'department', 'priority', 'status'];

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function assignedTo()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'assigned_to');
    }

    public function messages()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(TicketMessage::class);
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    public function getStatusFarsiAttribute()
    {
        $statuses = [
            'open' => 'ШЁШ§ШІ (Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ)',
            'pending' => 'ШҜШұ ШӯШ§Щ„ ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ', // ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
            'answered' => 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ',
            'customer_reply' => 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Щ…ШҙШӘШұЫҢ',
            'closed' => 'ШЁШіШӘЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ'
        ];
        return $statuses[$this->status] ?? $this->status;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Traits/Agent/HasAgentLogic.php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Traits\Agent;

use App\Models\ActivityLog;
use App\Models\ReferralCommission;

trait HasAgentLogic
{
    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ
     */
    public function isVerified()
    {
        return !is_null($this->verified_at);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getClientCountAttribute()
    {
        return $this->clients()->count();
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШёШұЩҒЫҢШӘ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЫҢ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ
     */
    public function hasAvailableSlots()
    {
        if (is_null($this->max_clients)) {
            return true; // ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЫҢШӘ
        }
        return $this->client_count < $this->max_clients;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҶ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getStatusTextAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->is_active) return 'ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„';
        if (!$this->isVerified()) return 'ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ';
        return 'ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ„Ш§Ші ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getStatusColorAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->is_active) return 'danger';
        if (!$this->isVerified()) return 'warning';
        return 'success';
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШҜШұШөШҜ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ ШёШұЩҒЫҢШӘ
     */
    public function getCapacityPercentageAttribute()
    {
        if (is_null($this->max_clients) || $this->max_clients == 0) {
            return null;
        }

        return min(100, round(($this->client_count / $this->max_clients) * 100, 2));
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ„ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШ¬ЩҶШӘ
     * Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШіЫҢЩҲЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ
     */
    public function getTotalCommissionAttribute()
    {
        return ReferralCommission::whereHas('referralNetwork', function($q) {
             $q->where('referrer_id', $this->user_id);
        })->sum('earned_points');
    }

    /**
     * ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function verify($adminId)
    {
        $result = $this->update([
            'verified_at' => now(),
            'is_active' => true,
        ]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'agent.verified',
                "ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ъ©ШҜ {$this->agent_code} ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ ШҙШҜ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function deactivate($adminId, $reason = '')
    {
        $result = $this->update(['is_active' => false]);

        if ($result) {
            ActivityLog::log(
                'agent.deactivated',
                "ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ъ©ШҜ {$this->agent_code} ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҙШҜ. ШҜЩ„ЫҢЩ„: {$reason}",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'admin_id' => $adminId,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                    'old_values' => ['is_active' => true],
                    'new_values' => ['is_active' => false],
                ]
            );
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * ШӘЩҲЩ„ЫҢШҜ Ъ©ШҜ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЩҶШҜЪҜЫҢ ЫҢЪ©ШӘШ§
     */
    public static function generateAgentCode()
    {
        do {
            $code = 'AG' . strtoupper(substr(md5(uniqid()), 0, 6));
        } while (self::where('agent_code', $code)->exists());

        return $code;
    }
}

----------------------------------------
# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Traits/User/HasAuthLogic.php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Traits\User;

use App\Models\UserStatus;

trait HasAuthLogic
{
    public function isOtpVerified()
    {
        return !is_null($this->otp_verified_at);
    }

    public function isAgent()
    {
        return !is_null($this->agent_id) || $this->hasRole('agent');
    }

    public function isAdmin()
    {
        return $this->hasRole('admin');
    }

    public function isActive()
    {
        // Cache the active status ID to prevent N+1 queries on every request
        $activeStatusId = \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache::rememberForever('active_user_status_id', function () {
            $status = \App\Models\UserStatus::where('slug', 'active')->first();
            return $status ? $status->id : null;
        });

        if ($activeStatusId) {
            return $this->status_id === $activeStatusId;
        }

        return optional($this->status)->slug === 'active';
    }

    public function canLoginWithPassword()
    {
        return !empty($this->password) && !is_null($this->password_set_at);
    }

    public function shouldUseOtpLogin()
    {
        if (!$this->canLoginWithPassword()) {
            return true;
        }
        if ($this->created_at->diffInDays(now()) < 7) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public function getLoginMethod()
    {
        if ($this->shouldUseOtpLogin()) {
            return 'otp';
        }
        return 'password';
    }

    public function setPassword($password)
    {
        $this->password = bcrypt($password);
        $this->password_set_at = now();
        $this->save();
    }

    public function verifyOtp($otp)
    {
        if ($this->otp === $otp) {
            $this->update([
                'otp_verified_at' => now(),
                'otp' => null,
                'status_id' => UserStatus::where('slug', 'active')->first()->id,
            ]);
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public function sendNewOtp()
    {
        $otp = rand(10000, 99999);
        $this->update([
            'otp' => $otp,
            'otp_verified_at' => null,
        ]);
        return $otp;
    }

    public function updateLastLogin()
    {
        $this->update(['last_login_at' => now()]);
    }

    public function hasVerifiedEmail() { return !is_null($this->email_verified_at); }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Traits/User/HasGamificationLogic.php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Traits\User;

trait HasGamificationLogic
{
    public function generateReferralCode()
    {
        if (!$this->referral_code) {
            $code = strtoupper(substr(md5($this->mobile . time()), 0, 8));
            $this->update(['referral_code' => $code]);
        }
        return $this->referral_code;
    }

    public function getDirectReferrals()
    {
        return $this->referrals()->where('level', 1)->with('referred')->get();
    }

    public function getDirectReferralsCountAttribute()
    {
        return $this->referrals()->where('level', 1)->count();
    }

    public function canReferNewUser()
    {
        return $this->isActive() && $this->profile_completed;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Traits/User/HasProfileLogic.php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Traits\User;

use Illuminate\Support\Str;
use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;

trait HasProfileLogic
{
    public function getFullNameAttribute()
    {
        return trim($this->first_name . ' ' . $this->last_name);
    }

    public function getProfileCompletionPercentageAttribute()
    {
        $requiredFields = [
            'first_name', 'last_name', 'national_code', 'birth_date', 
            'job', 'province_id', 'city_id', 'postal_code', 'address', 
            'email', 'avatar',
        ];

        $completed = 0;
        foreach ($requiredFields as $field) {
            if (!empty($this->$field)) {
                $completed++;
            }
        }

        return round(($completed / count($requiredFields)) * 100);
    }

    public function getCreatedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->created_at)->format('Y/m/d');
    }

    public function getBirthDateJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->birth_date ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->birth_date)->format('Y/m/d') : null;
    }

    public function getFullAddressAttribute()
    {
        $parts = [];
        if ($this->province) $parts[] = $this->province->name;
        if ($this->city) $parts[] = $this->city->name;
        if ($this->address) $parts[] = $this->address;

        return implode(' - ', $parts);
    }

    public function getAgeAttribute()
    {
        if (!$this->birth_date) {
            return null;
        }
        return $this->birth_date->age;
    }

    public function isBirthdayToday()
    {
        if (!$this->birth_date) {
            return false;
        }
        return $this->birth_date->month == now()->month &&
               $this->birth_date->day == now()->day;
    }

    public function completeProfile()
    {
        if (!$this->profile_completed) {
            $this->update(['profile_completed' => true]);
        }
    }

    public function initials(): string
    {
        return Str::of($this->first_name . ' ' . $this->last_name)
            ->explode(' ')
            ->take(2)
            ->map(fn ($word) => Str::substr($word, 0, 1))
            ->implode('');
    }
    
    public function getProvinceNameAttribute()
    {
        return $this->province ? $this->province->name : null;
    }

    public function getCityNameAttribute()
    {
        return $this->city ? $this->city->name : null;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/Traits/User/HasSystemRelations.php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Traits\User;

use App\Models\UserStatus;
use App\Models\Club;
use App\Models\User;
use App\Models\Agent;
use App\Models\Province;
use App\Models\City;
use App\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Models\SurveyAnswer;
use App\Models\ClubRegistration;
use App\Models\ReferralNetwork;
use App\Models\UserSession;
use App\Models\SmsLog;
use App\Models\EmailLog;
use App\Models\ActivityLog;
use App\Models\ProductSerial;

trait HasSystemRelations
{
    public function status()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(UserStatus::class, 'status_id');
    }

    public function club()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Club::class, 'club_id');
    }

    public function memberships()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(Club::class, 'club_user')->withPivot('joined_at', 'is_active');
    }

    public function referredBy()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'referred_by');
    }

    public function agent()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Agent::class, 'agent_id');
    }

    public function province()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Province::class);
    }

    public function city()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(City::class);
    }

    public function pointTransactions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(PointTransaction::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function surveyAnswers()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SurveyAnswer::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function clubRegistrations()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ClubRegistration::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function referrals()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ReferralNetwork::class, 'referrer_id');
    }

    public function referredUsers()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ReferralNetwork::class, 'referred_id');
    }

    public function userSessions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(UserSession::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function smsLogs()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SmsLog::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function emailLogs()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(EmailLog::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function activityLogs()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ActivityLog::class, 'user_id');
    }

    public function registeredSerials()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ProductSerial::class, 'used_by');
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/User.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Spatie\Permission\Traits\HasRoles;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Laravel\Fortify\TwoFactorAuthenticatable;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;

// Import Custom Traits
use App\Models\Traits\User\HasProfileLogic;
use App\Models\Traits\User\HasAuthLogic;
use App\Models\Traits\User\HasGamificationLogic;
use App\Models\Traits\User\HasSystemRelations;

class User extends Authenticatable
{
    use HasFactory, Notifiable, SoftDeletes, HasRoles, TwoFactorAuthenticatable;
    
    // Include split logic traits
    use HasProfileLogic, HasAuthLogic, HasGamificationLogic, HasSystemRelations;

    protected $fillable = [
        'mobile', 'otp', 'otp_verified_at',
        'username', 'password', 'password_set_at', 'current_points',
        'two_factor_secret', 'two_factor_recovery_codes', 'two_factor_confirmed_at', 'email_verified_at',
        'profile_completed',
        'first_name', 'last_name', 'national_code', 'birth_date', 'gender',
        'marital_status', 'job', 
        'province_id', 'city_id',
        'postal_code', 'address',
        'email', 'avatar',
        'status_id', 'club_id', 'referral_code', 'referred_by', 'agent_id',
        'last_login_at', 'remember_token',
        'theme_preferences', 
        'dashboard_preferences', 
    ];

    protected $hidden = [
        'otp', 'password', 'remember_token', 'two_factor_secret', 'two_factor_recovery_codes',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'otp_verified_at' => 'datetime',
        'password_set_at' => 'datetime',
        'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',
        'two_factor_confirmed_at' => 'datetime',
        'birth_date' => 'date',
        'profile_completed' => 'boolean',
        'last_login_at' => 'datetime',
        'current_points' => 'integer',
        'theme_preferences' => 'array',     // ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘЫҢ: ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜЪ©Ш§Шұ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
        'dashboard_preferences' => 'array', // ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘЫҢ: ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш®ЩҲШҜЪ©Ш§Шұ JSON ШЁЩҮ ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ
    ];

    // --- Global Scopes ---

    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->whereHas('status', function ($q) {
            $q->where('slug', 'active');
        });
    }

    public function scopeProfileCompleted($query)
    {
        return $query->where('profile_completed', true);
    }

    public function scopeByMobile($query, $mobile)
    {
        return $query->where('mobile', $mobile);
    }

    public function scopeByClub($query, $clubId)
    {
        return $query->where('club_id', $clubId);
    }

    public function assignedTickets()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Ticket::class, 'assigned_to');
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/UserSession.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Morilog\Jalali\Jalalian;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class UserSession extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'user_id',              // Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        'session_type',         // ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ
        'page_url',             // ШўШҜШұШі ШөЩҒШӯЩҮ
        'started_at',           // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҲШ№
        'ended_at',             // ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ
        'duration_seconds',     // Щ…ШҜШӘ ШЁШ§ШІШҜЫҢШҜ
        'ip_address',           // ШўЫҢвҖҢЩҫЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
        'user_agent',           // Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШұЩҲШұЪҜШұ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'started_at' => 'datetime',
        'ended_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->whereNull('ended_at');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ЪҜШ°ШҙШӘЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeInactive($query)
    {
        return $query->whereNotNull('ended_at');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш®Ш§Шө
     */
    public function scopeType($query, $type)
    {
        return $query->where('session_type', $type);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ Ш®Ш§Шө
     */
    public function scopeByUser($query, $userId)
    {
        return $query->where('user_id', $userId);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§ШІЩҮ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
     */
    public function scopeBetweenDates($query, $startDate, $endDate)
    {
        return $query->whereBetween('started_at', [$startDate, $endDate]);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ШЁШ§ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®Ш§Шө
     */
    public function scopeLongSessions($query, $minSeconds = 300)
    {
        return $query->where('duration_seconds', '>=', $minSeconds);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ Ъ©ЩҲШӘШ§ЩҮ
     */
    public function scopeShortSessions($query, $maxSeconds = 60)
    {
        return $query->where('duration_seconds', '<=', $maxSeconds);
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘ
     */
    public function isActive()
    {
        return is_null($this->ended_at);
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШҙШҜЩҮ
     */
    public function getDurationFormattedAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->duration_seconds < 60) {
            return "{$this->duration_seconds} Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ";
        } elseif ($this->duration_seconds < 3600) {
            $minutes = floor($this->duration_seconds / 60);
            $seconds = $this->duration_seconds % 60;
            return "{$minutes} ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ {$seconds} Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ";
        } else {
            $hours = floor($this->duration_seconds / 3600);
            $minutes = floor(($this->duration_seconds % 3600) / 60);
            return "{$hours} ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ {$minutes} ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ";
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getStartedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->started_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i');
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩ…ШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getEndedAtJalaliAttribute()
    {
        return $this->ended_at ? Jalalian::fromDateTime($this->ended_at)->format('Y/m/d H:i') : null;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҶШ§Щ… ШөЩҒШӯЩҮ Ш§ШІ URL
     */
    public function getPageNameAttribute()
    {
        $url = parse_url($this->page_url);
        $path = $url['path'] ?? '/';

        $pages = [
            '/' => 'ШөЩҒШӯЩҮ Ш§ШөЩ„ЫҢ',
            '/dashboard' => 'ШҜШ§ШҙШЁЩҲШұШҜ',
            '/club' => 'ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ',
            '/surveys' => 'ЩҶШёШұШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§',
            '/points' => 'Ш§Щ…ШӘЫҢШ§ШІШ§ШӘ',
            '/referrals' => 'Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒЫҢ ШҜЩҲШіШӘШ§ЩҶ',
            '/profile' => 'ЩҫШұЩҲЩҒШ§ЫҢЩ„',
        ];

        return $pages[$path] ?? $path;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ
     */
    public function getSessionTypeFarsiAttribute()
    {
        $types = [
            'club_visit' => 'ШЁШ§ШІШҜЫҢШҜ ШЁШ§ШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮ',
            'dashboard' => 'ШҜШ§ШҙШЁЩҲШұШҜ',
            'product_view' => 'Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜЩҮ Щ…ШӯШөЩҲЩ„',
        ];

        return $types[$this->session_type] ?? $this->session_type;
    }

    /**
     * ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ
     */
    public static function startSession($userId, $sessionType, $pageUrl)
    {
        $session = self::create([
            'user_id' => $userId,
            'session_type' => $sessionType,
            'page_url' => $pageUrl,
            'started_at' => now(),
            'ip_address' => request()->ip(),
            'user_agent' => request()->userAgent(),
        ]);

        return $session;
    }

    /**
     * ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҶ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ
     */
    public function endSession()
    {
        if ($this->isActive()) {
            $endedAt = now();
            $duration = $this->started_at->diffInSeconds($endedAt);

            $this->update([
                'ended_at' => $endedAt,
                'duration_seconds' => $duration,
            ]);

            // Ш«ШЁШӘ Щ„Ш§ЪҜ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ
            ActivityLog::log(
                'user.session_end',
                "Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұЫҢ ШЁШ§ Щ…ШҜШӘ {$this->duration_formatted} ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ",
                [
                    'user_id' => $this->user_id,
                    'model_type' => self::class,
                    'model_id' => $this->id,
                ]
            );

            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұЩҲШІШұШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ Щ…ШҜШӘ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public static function updateActiveSessions()
    {
        $activeSessions = self::active()->get();

        foreach ($activeSessions as $session) {
            $duration = $session->started_at->diffInSeconds(now());

            // Ш§ЪҜШұ Ш¬Щ„ШіЩҮ ШЁЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ 4 ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҮШҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҮЫҢЩ…
            if ($duration > 14400) {
                $session->endSession();
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШўЩ…Ш§Шұ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public static function getUserSessionsStats($userId)
    {
        $stats = [
            'total_sessions' => self::byUser($userId)->count(),
            'active_sessions' => self::byUser($userId)->active()->count(),
            'total_duration' => self::byUser($userId)->sum('duration_seconds'),
            'avg_duration' => self::byUser($userId)->avg('duration_seconds'),
            'by_type' => self::byUser($userId)
                ->selectRaw('session_type, count(*) as count, avg(duration_seconds) as avg_duration')
                ->groupBy('session_type')
                ->get()
                ->pluck('avg_duration', 'session_type')
                ->toArray(),
            'recent_pages' => self::byUser($userId)
                ->orderBy('started_at', 'desc')
                ->limit(10)
                ->pluck('page_url')
                ->toArray(),
        ];

        return $stats;
    }

    /**
     * ЩҫШ§Ъ©вҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ЩӮШҜЫҢЩ…ЫҢ
     */
    public static function cleanOldSessions($days = 30)
    {
        $date = now()->subDays($days);
        return self::where('started_at', '<', $date)->delete();
    }

    /**
     * ШӘШҙШ®ЫҢШө ШҜШіШӘЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ШІ user_agent
     */
    public function getDeviceInfoAttribute()
    {
        $agent = $this->user_agent;

        if (strpos($agent, 'Mobile') !== false) {
            $device = 'Щ…ЩҲШЁШ§ЫҢЩ„';
        } elseif (strpos($agent, 'Tablet') !== false) {
            $device = 'ШӘШЁЩ„ШӘ';
        } else {
            $device = 'Ъ©Ш§Щ…ЩҫЫҢЩҲШӘШұ';
        }

        // ШӘШҙШ®ЫҢШө Щ…ШұЩҲШұЪҜШұ
        if (strpos($agent, 'Chrome') !== false) {
            $browser = 'Chrome';
        } elseif (strpos($agent, 'Firefox') !== false) {
            $browser = 'Firefox';
        } elseif (strpos($agent, 'Safari') !== false) {
            $browser = 'Safari';
        } else {
            $browser = 'ЩҶШ§ШҙЩҶШ§Ші';
        }

        return [
            'device' => $device,
            'browser' => $browser,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҮЩ…ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ
     */
    public static function hasTooManySessions($userId, $maxSessions = 5)
    {
        $activeSessions = self::byUser($userId)->active()->count();
        return $activeSessions >= $maxSessions;
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Models/UserStatus.php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;

class UserStatus extends Model
{
    use HasFactory, SoftDeletes;

    /**
     * ЩҒЫҢЩ„ШҜЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ЩҫШұ ШҙШҜЩҶ
     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'name',        // ЩҶШ§Щ… ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ (ЩҒШ§ШұШіЫҢ)
        'slug',        // ЩҶШ§Щ…Ъ© ЫҢЪ©ШӘШ§ (Ш§ЩҶЪҜЩ„ЫҢШіЫҢ)
        'color',       // ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШҜШұ ШҜШ§ШҙШЁЩҲШұШҜ
        'is_active',   // ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҲШҜЩҶ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
        'order',       // ШӘШұШӘЫҢШЁ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ ШҜШұ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§
        'description', // ШӘЩҲШ¶ЫҢШӯШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
    ];

    /**
     * ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШҜШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§
     */
    protected $casts = [
        'is_active' => 'boolean', // ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁЩҮ ШЁЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ
    ];

    protected static function booted()
    {
        $clearCache = function () {
            try {
                if (\Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema::hasTable('cache')) {
                     cache()->forget('active_user_status_id');
                }
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                // ignore
            }
        };

        static::saved($clearCache);
        static::deleted($clearCache);
        static::created($clearCache);
    }

    // ==================== ШұЩҲШ§ШЁШ· ====================

    /**
     * ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ
     * ЩҮШұ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ ШЁЩҮ ЪҶЩҶШҜЫҢЩҶ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
     */
    public function users()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(User::class, 'status_id');
    }

    // ==================== Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫвҖҢЩҮШ§ ====================

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„
     */
    public function scopeActive($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_active', true);
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ШұШӘШЁвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ШӘШұШӘЫҢШЁ
     */
    public function scopeOrdered($query)
    {
        return $query->orderBy('order');
    }

    /**
     * Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҫ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ ШҜШұ dropdown
     */
    public function scopeForDropdown($query)
    {
        return $query->active()->ordered()->pluck('name', 'id');
    }

    // ==================== ШӘЩҲШ§ШЁШ№ Ъ©Щ…Ъ©ЫҢ ====================

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Ъ©Щ„Ш§Ші CSS ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ
     * @return string Ъ©Щ„Ш§Ші CSS
     */
    public function getColorClassAttribute()
    {
        return "status-{$this->slug}";
    }

    /**
     * ШЁШұШұШіЫҢ ШўЫҢШ§ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ШӯШ°ЩҒ Ш§ШіШӘ ЫҢШ§ ЩҶЩҮ
     * ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ ШӯШ°ЩҒ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ Ш§ЪҜШұ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isDeletable()
    {
        return $this->users()->count() === 0;
    }

    /**
     * ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ Ъ©Ш§ШұШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЫҢШӘ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЪҜШІШ§ШұШҙ)
     * @return \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Collection
     */
    public function getUsersList()
    {
        return $this->users()->with('club')->get();
    }
}

# D:/clubinex/app/Notifications/SystemNotification.php
<?php

namespace App\Notifications;

use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\DatabaseMessage;

class SystemNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Queueable;

    // ШӘЩҶШёЫҢЩ…Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҮЩ… ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ Щ„ЩҲЩҫ ШЁЫҢвҖҢЩҶЩҮШ§ЫҢШӘ
    public $tries = 3; // ШӯШҜШ§Ъ©Ш«Шұ Ыі ШЁШ§Шұ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ
    public $timeout = 10; // ЫұЫ° Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ Щ…ЩҮЩ„ШӘ Ш§Ш¬ШұШ§
    public $backoff = 5; // Ыө Ш«Ш§ЩҶЫҢЩҮ ШөШЁШұ ШЁЫҢЩҶ ШӘЩ„Ш§ШҙвҖҢЩҮШ§

    protected $title;
    protected $message;

    public function __construct($title, $message)
    {
        $this->title = $title;
        $this->message = $message;
    }

    public function via($notifiable)
    {
        return ['database'];
    }

    public function toDatabase($notifiable)
    {
        return [
            'title' => $this->title,
            'message' => $this->message,
            'icon' => 'bell',
            'link' => null,
            // Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШӘШұШ§ЫҢ/Ъ©ЪҶ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘЩҶ Ш¬Ш§ШЁ ШЁЩҮ Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ ЩҒШұЩ…ШӘ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®
            'created_at_jalali' => now()->format('Y/m/d H:i') 
        ];
    }
}
